Guide was very nice and arrived on time and provided perfect instruction for the group and ensured we were all together.  Buyer beware, you do not kayak THROUGH a cave. You kayak to a cavern that is so small that you need to back your kayak into it in order to get out.  We also had to wait in a kayak line for 45 min before entering because of all the tourists.  Once there, the water is truly a beautiful emerald green but you're there for like 1 min then you kayak back.  All in all, it was a lovely day on the Colorado river.  Just know its not much of a cave!   Many on our trip were disappointed.

The views wrre incredible and out your guide Dash was amazing and was awesome at keeping the group together and had answers for every queston about the area! A caution though for those going by sbuttle for the express tour. You get picked up around 9 and really dont get back to the strip until around 4 so it is more of an all day thing. Also check to see how crowded the tours are because by the time we kayaked to the cave (2 miles by kayak)  there was a line of other kayakers n an additional wait time of 45 - 60 minutes to get in which our group voted not to do (likely because we all had time constraints). To Dash's credit he was committed to waiting the hour with us if we had voted to stay in the long line.  Since the group voted no we didnt even end up going in the cavern which was why we booked the excursion . That was definitely a disappointment but we still had a great time!

Thank you for your positive review! We're glad you enjoyed your kayak tour of the Emerald Cave with Dylan as your guide. We'll be sure to pass along your compliments to him. We hope to see you again soon for another great adventure.

Thank you for the positive feedback, Julie! We're glad to hear that you had a great experience with our guide Dylan and that the tour was enjoyable and filled with laughter. We hope to see you again soon!

We had an awesome time with our tour guide Burton.  He was a great tour guide. He explained a lot of the vegetation that was growing around the river. He made sure that we were all comfortable in our kayaks.  It was a great tour.

I went on the express kayak tour which was scheduled to leave at 10am but changed to 7am due to wind. The change was actually a blessing in disguise. The water was initially calm and the weather was not too hot or windy. It was an amazing experience and so nice to get outside of the LV strip.
Thank you so much for the raving review.  We are thrilled Salvator was great and so was your experience.  Thank you for choosing Evolution Expeditions.

Thank you for your positive feedback, we are glad you enjoyed your experience with our knowledgeable and friendly guide. We are happy to hear that our guide went above and beyond by lending your brother a swim shirt and that you found the experience to be nice and relaxing. We appreciate your recommendation and hope to see you again soon.

This was the first time we did a kayaking excursion. Our guide Salvatore was patient with us amateurs and very knowledgeable about the area and the wildlife. The views were awesome and we would definitely do it again.

Well organized and Jared provided so much information, we feel like we learned a lot! We were lucky and had a small group. Jared made sure we were comfortable and going at a good pace and did warn us that there will be a wait before getting to the Emerald Cave. Jared was a great guide! Pointing out different types of survival skills, Bob's old house, and we were lucky enough to see a bald eagle flying and a few baby bighorn sheep! Truly a wonderful experience! But make sure to lather on the sunscreen before and after! We booked the tour last minute, but the staff member made sure to contact me to get all the waivers signed and provided critical information prior to the tour. Warning, there isn't cell service there. And the address provided is further into the beach. Just look for the launching area instead of following the gps all the way to the address like we did.
Thank you for your kind words, Marianeen! We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your experience with our guide Salvatore. We'll be sure to pass along your feedback!

I can't recommend this enough. Alex and Ryan were our tour guides on 15th September and they were exceptional. They were fun, they brought the groups energy up and got to know everyone. Then we reached the cove and it was spectacular. I will be recommending this trip and in particular evolution expeditions to everyone I know!!!! Thanks guys.

The views were amazing . Our guide Dash was super friendly, helpful and patient . The weather was fantastic . The photos do no do justice. It’s a great experience and will definitely be back with my family

Simply put, Burton was incredible guide and the expedition exceeded all expectations. The scenery was amazing, Burton’s knowledge and interpersonal skills were impressive. He not only helped a novice kayaker feel confident on our tour, but he also had to help tow a kayak of two because they couldn’t seem to paddle in sync facing the headwinds.If you use this company, ask for Burton, he was worth the money. I hope the company appreciates what they have in this excellent guide.
Thank you for your positive review, Joyce! We are glad to hear that you had a fabulous time with our informative tour guide, Dash. We look forward to having you join us again in the future.

I would recommend this kayak trip! Our guide, Gina was fabulous! The trip was perfect and we were first time kayakers and she put all our worries at ease. We will definitely go again. It was a beautiful trip too!!
Thank you so much for the raving review.  We are so happy to hear Jared made the tour for you.  We hope to see you again soon!

Thank you for your positive feedback, Dominika! We are so glad that you enjoyed your outing with us and that Ryan was able to provide great information and a fun experience. Your recommendation means a lot to us.
Thank you for your positive review, Kobi! We're glad you had a nice experience and that you found our staff friendly. We'll take your suggestion of better options for older people into consideration.
Thank you for your great review, Kim! We are so glad to hear that you enjoyed your experience with Gina and that kayaking and hiking on the Colorado River was a great experience.

Thank you for your kind words and 5 star rating! We're so glad you enjoyed your tour with Chris and that you found it both beautiful and informative. We appreciate your recommendation and hope to see you again soon!

Thank you so much for your kind words, Jennie! We're delighted to hear that you had a great time and that Chris was able to make your kayaking trip even more enjoyable. We're happy to hear you enjoyed the Emerald Cave and the beautiful water!

This was a fantastic trip with my son. We booked it the night before and drove to willow beach and Dash our guide was there waiting for us. We had a tandem canoe and Dash explained everything to is on how to use it and where we were going on the route. He was extremely informative and took the time to talk to everyone answering all the questions we had. I would definitely recommend this trip to anyone and the scenery was awesome
Thank you, Philipp! We are so pleased to hear that Burton was able to make your trip both fun and educational. We appreciate your positive review!

Burton was an amazing guide. He added a ton of interesting commentary and stories that made the trip awesome! I would definitely recommend trying this kayak tour with Evolution Expeditions for yourself. Highly recommended!!!!

Absolutely worth it! The water is refreshing and beautiful. Our guide Burton was fabulous. He was super knowledgeable and filled the time with interesting stories along with pointing out all the wildlife along the way. 10/10.
Thank you so much for your kind words! We're so glad to hear that you enjoyed your tour with Chris and that you found it informative. We appreciate your recommendation!
Thank you for the wonderful review! We're so glad to hear that Salvatore made your experience fun and easy to follow. We look forward to seeing you again soon!

It was ok. I’d give it more stars if they didn’t forget my lunch. $150 and I couldn’t even get a lunch. Thankfully I brought food because their snacks are hardly a meal. I can’t even review the trip because that was aggravating. And some parent let their kid spray their powerful squirt gun at the back of peoples heads. Not cool! I didn’t even know this kid and the parent was obviously a moron. The guide should have stopped that.

Burton was our tour guide, and he was awesome! He is from the area and very knowledgeable of the local history, wildlife and vegetation. It's about 4.5 miles of kayaking and took a few hours. Burton reviewed the basics of safely using the kayaks and provided assistance where necessary.  Bring lots of water to stay hydrated, and bring extra suntan lotion/lip balm. We wore sun shirts, hats and sunglasses which were all very helpful. The Emerald Cave is small but the photo op inside is stunning!

Burton is an experienced guide who safely guided our group to and from the Emerald Cave. The kayaking trip was spectacular! We had a variety of levels of experience in our group and Burton taught each of us the basics so that we could navigate the kayak amongst boaters and jet skis, along with other kayak tours. The views are fabulous! Burton is a native of the area and was able to point out the unique wildlife and vegetation along the river. Once inside the Emerald Cave, we were able to take photos to capture the beauty. Tips for those considering this trip - it is in the desert and therefore hot. My wife and I wore sun shirts and had suntan lotion on the rest of our body, and also wore hats and sunglasses, all necessary. We also brought large water bottles, also necessary. Snacks are provided, but we don’t eat the type of snacks that were provided so we brought our own baby carrots and protein bars, which helped. Bring extra lotion, lip balm and drink the water so you don’t get dehydrated. Definitely request Burton as your tour guide and have fun!

This tour was great! Not overly difficult and great views! The water is amazing and we got to see some cool wildlife! Our tour guide Sal was awesome. He is so experienced and knowledgeable! Highly recommend choosing him if possible!

It was great escape in nature. Our tour guide (Carson), pick us at the hotel, bring us to the Marina where we started and give as snack on our stop at beach. He was interesting and have a lot of lot knowledge about animals, plants and other staff that we saw on our tour. Highly recomended!
We had an amazing time kayaking! Kensi was a Fantastic guide! We took so many pictures and loved it!
Salvatore was really knowledgeable of the wide life and plants around the area. Hd was fun and energetic and was great to have as a guide. If you are going to book a tour definitely do it!

A little misunderstanding regarding the tour time and when you actually need to be there for the instructions to be given.  Because of this misunderstanding about the actual tour time, we had to have a talk in order to be able to go and see the cove instead of doing an unplanned hike on a beach nearby, but finally Aaron, our guide, decided to take us there and the view was stunning.Thank you Aaron and all the staff for letting us be late on the tour and show us Emerald Cove. I would recommend as a company because they actually go above and beyond to please the customers.
Thank you so much for your 5 star review and kind words about Gina! We're so glad you had an amazing experience and we look forward to seeing you again soon!
Thank you to Dylan and Zack for being amazing guides for our day of kayaking on the Colorado. If you’re visiting Las Vegas, this is a great way to spend a day and enjoy the outdoors

Our tour guide Dylan , he was very friendly and knowledgeable about the emerald cave, very engertic person . If you have any questions, he will answer the best he can.  I will recommend him to anyone.

Dash was amazing ! Especially since my wife didn't know her way around a kayak, she was a pro by the end of the ride ! All of the staff was friendly accommodating, and after a 4 mile kayak ride, I've probably never had a better lunch ! Thank you so much for making our vacation special ! If you are looking for an awesome experience, this is the company to trust ! Dash is a trained professional, and we felt safe and comfortable the entire time.

Thank you for such a wonderful review, Eliyahu! We appreciate your kind words and are so glad to hear that your whole family enjoyed the experience. Dylan is a great asset to our team and we're glad you had such a great time.

This was a birthday trip I turned sixty two was on my bucket list! If you haven't done this, you should do this, This was the first time for me and I felt safe and confident thanks to Gina and all the crew! This company was fantastic we had fun so much! Gina was so knowledgeable and a great personality She made our experience perfect.

We had an awesome time on this tour! I would recommend to anyone.  Ryan, our tour guide, was very fun and friendly.  We went early in the morning and the river was beautiful: quiet and no wait time at the cove! You do get wet, but not overly unless you choose too.  I would recommend some sort of shoe that can be wet.The water is cold, but honestly feels great.  We all swam during our "beach stops" and the water guns provided with the kayaks were a bonus.  Not all tours do the water guns.  The guide brings snacks and water/juice boxes which is also welcomed.  The trip took about 3-hrs; we did not have extensive kayaking experience and it was fine. We had SO much fun and we would do it again in a minute.  We drove there on our own from Las Vegas - about 60 min drive.  We stopped on the way back in Boulder City and ate at The Dillinger...amazing burgers, salads, cold beer and other drinks - recommend this too.
Thank you for your kind words, Robin! We're so glad you enjoyed your time on the river with Gina. We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience!

Awesome experience, incredible way to spend a hot day on the cooling and spectacular Colorado River, our guide was amazing, so full of information, the Emerald Cave was just like the pictures, vibrant green, nice refreshing swim half way, and fun paddle back. Exceeded our expectations in every possible way!

What a great trip! There’s something about the beauty of the water and canyons. It’s something to recognize and appreciate! Shoutout to Jared “JP” our guide. He’s just a cool ass dude who loves Mother Nature! We signed up as strangers and left with friends!
Thank you for the excellent review, David! We're so glad Ryan was able to make your kayak tour a ton of fun and educational. We look forward to seeing you again soon!Thank you

Highly recommend this tour! Wear a hat you can get wet and water shoes. Be prepared to have a moderate workout too! It’s a beautiful tour on crystal clear water. The cave is really pretty and all the history around the area is fascinating too. Stay close to your guide so you can hear it 😊

Thank you for your review, James D! We are so happy to hear that you had an enjoyable experience with our paddle guides. We strive to provide the best service and are glad that you had a pleasant time.

This was an amazing experience. We would highly recommend. Our children felt the same - our day was made even more special with our excellent guide Sal who was so informative giving us all the interesting information about the stretch of the Colorado river we were exploring. He is also incredibly knowledgeable about the wildlife which was so interesting. The children were seriously impressed when he safely showed those who wanted to see a snake asleep on a rock !. The cave was even more ‘emerald’ than we thought it would be. And we had great fun with the water squirters on the way back to the beach.our 17 year old daughter said it was her best experience ever.
Sal did an amazing job. He was knowledgeable about the wild life and the sights along the river. Could not have asked for a better guide!
Thank you for your wonderful review, Alexa! We are so glad you enjoyed the tour and Sal's informative commentary. We hope to see you again soon!
Thank you for the fantastic review, John! We are so glad you had a good experience with Burton and that you will be coming back soon. Thank you for choosing us!
Thank you so much, Melissa! We are delighted to hear that Burton did a great job and that you enjoyed the tour. We appreciate your kind words and 5-star rating!

Tour was absolutely beautiful and our Guide Salvatore was a fantastic tour guide. Very knowledgeable and passionate about the area. Also very aware of wild life. He spotted a rattlesnake on the rocks, and we where able to get a photo and see it. Absolutely amazing time. He definitely had a fun personality as well.
Really enjoyed the trip and our two guides, Dylan and Dash, were fun and personable. Great combination of serene atmosphere and some light exercise.
Thank you so much for your kind words! We're so glad you enjoyed your time with Justin and that this was one of your favorite parts of your trip. We appreciate your recommendation!
Thank you so much for your kind words, Najla! We're so glad to hear that you had an enjoyable experience with Dylan and Karson. We hope you have many more memorable moments with us!

my favorite part was enjoying the view around me and being able to experience the enclave. Dylan and Karson were great tour guides ! They taught us the history behind the cave and were very friendly and nice . I recommended this Kayak experience!

Had our session with Dylan and Karson. Both guides were extremely professional and friendly. They gave us a great tour of not only the lake but the surrounding area too. We even go to see some sheep afterwards. Would 100% recommend this tour to anyone and if I am ever in Vegas again I am requesting the two guides specifically for another tour.
It was amazing and all the instructors were so nice and helpful. It was truly an amazing experience

Had a great time with Salvatore as our guide.  He was knowledgeable about the Colorado River, native plants and animals.  And an excellent kayaking guide.  He was funny and playful as well.  Very interesting guy.  I would definitely do it again.  Thank you for a fun experience.

10/10 recommend! When I first booked, I scheduled for the wrong day, which I didn’t realize until I got the call they were going to pick me up 😱. When I called them as soon as I realized my mistake , they were super nice and helpful and moved my reservation to the correct day for me! Now today for the day of the Kayak trip it was amazing! Our tour guide Burton was super knowledgeable and pointed out cool Interest points along the way to Emerald Cave. So thanks again, Burton for a fun day on the river!

Thank you for your positive review, Nicole! We're so glad that Burton was able to make your experience enjoyable and that you got to take advantage of the cool river. We look forward to seeing you again soon!

Dylan and Dash were our tour guides. Definitely make the tour 100x better. It was a beautiful experience and would do it again! They made everyone in my group love the trip. Dylan has such a great personality.

Amazing time! Super fun. Great lunch. Super nice and helpful staff. Would come again! If you have even the slightest fear of falling. These guys make sure to help when you need it. And encourage everyone!
Chanjira was the most excellent tour guide. She gave us freedom to paddle how we were comfortable and gave us great history and information. Recommend this tour but ask for Chanjira as your guide!
Great tour and experience overall and Burton was an awesome guide! Everything was explained patiently and always offered help when needed plus pretty interesting background stories about the area.
Awesome trip highly recommend Sal for your guide. he is very knowledgeable of the wildlife and plants and made the tour interesting.
Thank you for the wonderful review, Olof G! We are so glad that you and your group had such a great experience with Dylan as your guide. We appreciate your kind words!

Had a few issues at first with the scheduling but the actual tour was awesome.  Ryan was a great guide and made everything run smoothly.  Next time I'm in Vegas I'll definitely come back for another tour.

What an experience! This was my first time kayaking and I’m hooked!  Our guide, Sal, was knowledgeable not only about kayaking but also imparted lots of historical tidbits along with info on local animals and plants.  I highly recommend this company and I would most definitely ask for Sal!

Burton was extremely knowledgeable about the area and how the environment will possibly impact the Emerald Cave and surrounding areas.He was in-tune with all of us from the novice kayakers to the experienced and made sure that he and Ryan had a handle on the group at all times.
Fantastic day, incredible landscapes, we had a very fun group and our guide Salvatore was great, in addition to teaching us how to kayak, he made it even more great experience. Thank you

My 2 boys and I have had the privilege of touring California, Nevada and Arizona for 4 weeks. This trip was amazing and the best day we have had by far. All boxes ticked - beautiful scenery, kayaking and swimming in crystal clear waters of the Colorado River. Safe, fun (water soakers carried on the kayaks to which my boys loved) and snacks, drinks etc provided. Ryan was our guide who was excellent, extremely knowledgable and fun and took pictures and forwarded on free of charge. If we are lucky enough to be heading back this way in the future, we will be booking again for sure.
Beautiful place with a really good tour guy .Salvatore was really good at explaining everything on a trip to Emerald cave .
It was beautiful and so much fun!  Gina was a great tour guide and so friendly!  Our family had the best time.

Carson was a great tour guide. The whole trip was beautiful!! Even during a heat warning say if 117 we had water/ snack break and time to rest! Very easy going trip!  The kayaks were very easy to maneuver.

Carson was patient and helpful. My mom wanted to go but ran out of energy. Carson towed her the rest of the way never making her fill bad at all. He was informative and fun with everyone. Can’t wait to plan our next trip.

First time kayaking with some friends…pros and cons to the experience, but overall, if you’re looking a great excursion, do it with these folks!Pros:  My friends and I were picked up at The Venetian by Chanjira and Justin…and from the time they picked us up to the time they dropped us off, they were ABSOLUTELY AMAZING!!  It’s about an hour ride from the Vegas strip to Willow Beach, but it seemed like no time at all.  We rode in the van with Chanjira and she was very informative, not only about kayaking itself, but the surrounding areas of Las Vegas, Henderson, Lake Mead, and Willow Beach.  During the actual kayaking excursion, some of us (especially, me), were having difficulties paddling and steering (among other things that I’ll discuss later).  They were both so good and helped out with instruction on how to navigate thru the problems and/or physically help if need me.  I never would have gotten through the excursion without them!  A+ to the both of them in my book!  They also had waters and snacks readily available thruout the entire excursion.  Chanjira also had the A/C running in van before we got in, which was such a blessing on a 118 degree summer day!That all being said..Cons: If you’re prone to motion sickness, then this excursion may not be for you.  When boats and/jet skiers zoom by, their wakes rock the kayaks.  For me, it made me so sick to the point where I just couldn’t keep up with the group.  Had it not been for Chanjira and Justin towing me, I never would have gotten thru it all.  Also, take note that some degree of upper body strength is highly recommended, especially when the winds pick up.Overall, if you’re up for some kayaking adventure, these ppl are your go to peeps!

Whole experience was great! Chanjira and Justin were our guides for this expedition, and they were every informative and friendly. Snacks and drinks were provided as well. They were very patient, helping out the people who fell a bit behind and made sure we were all safe and cooled off.

I want to thank Evolution Expeditions for the experience they allowed me to take with my son Ryan Hannah my guide for the day. Ryan was very knowledgeable on the whole tour, the sites were amazing. Thank you also to Aaron, and Burton. It was just WOW!  ❤️

Our guide, Salvadore, was excellent! We enjoyed every minute of this tour.  The Colorado river was calm, people was nice and the nature was wonderful.Be on time! We have been charge 80 $/person (we were 4) because we had a gps problem and we were late of a few minutes.  We understand that we are not the center of the world and people cannot wait for us. Therefore the fees were excessive according to us.Remember : you enter Willow beach to begin your kayak tour and there are 25 $ fees to enter the marina. We did not know about it.
For the first time kayaking we had an amazing time, great experience. Trevin our tour guide was great lots of good information and great jokes. Would recommend.
Took my 9 yr old nephew for a day on the river and it was fantastic.  Sal and Kensie were patient and knowledgeable.  Best guides ever!
Such an amazing experience! Sal was our tour guide! He was very knowledgeable and helpful! I would highly recommend the Kayak Express Tour!

Salvador was out guide. He was awesome. He called to let us know where to meet him. He was ready for us, there was zero wait. He had us on the water in no time. He was full of Knowledge and was very informative. He was a lot of fun and the experience very memorable. The best part was stopping to take a dip in the river. 10/10 experience. I highly recommend bringing water shoes.
Beautiful views! Ryan was a great tour guide and very knowledgeable of the area. The kayak tour was the perfect amount of time.

Miranda...glad you enjoyed the canyon overall. The 900' volcanic walls and the history involved in the building of the dam are fascinating. The cave itself, as we explain, is small and offers a great photo op.

Had a great time, the staff was very knowledgeable and friendly. The water was crystal clear, and surprisingly deep. Only the second time being in a kayak, and Trevin (our guide) made sure we kept with the group and didn"t  lag behind. The Emerald Cave was worth the price, the rest was just added beauty. Just a piece of advice for the next group, put on some sun screen, and wear  a hat!

Fun kayaking trip! Our tour guide, Burton, was an awesome guide! He was very knowledgeable during the tour and traveled at a good pace for the beginners in our group! He provided drinks and snacks to keep our energy level up. I also recommend the 8AM morning trip as the sun was not at its peek. Totally recommend this tour package!
Awesome day kayaking!  Salvatore and Kenzie were brilliant.  Friendly, knowledgeable and perfect hosts.  The whole trip was exceptionally well run.  Definitely a “must do” 5*

We were very pleased with the entire experience from being picked up at our hotel, the excellent guide, Burton, the quality of the kayaks that had foot operated rudders, the delicious lunch that was provided, the trip to see the Bighorn sheep on the way back to Las Vegas and, finally, the absolute beauty of the Colorado River.  Water temperature on this 117 degree day was 53 degrees and we were able to swim in crystal clear, emerald green water to cool off and it was amazing!
Sandra was absolutely amazing!!! I would say she’s the best kayaking guide I’ve ever had!! She was energetic, fun, knowledgeable, and overall great to be around.

Dylan did a great job taking care of us and showing us the cool scenery. He offered help and snacks/refreshments when needed and have clear instructions on what we needed to do. Super fun experience, the river and cave was beautiful!

Sunscreen and other sun protection is key in the hotter months especially. The sun can be brutal and oftentimes while on the river in 53 degree water, folks forget they are exposed to the elements because it is so easy to stay cool out there. We do have a shop, BC Adventure Co, for any last minute river essentials or maybe just a souvenir of a cool dri-fit hoodie with our logo and the water trail. Check us out next time you're in the area.

We found Evolution Expeditions online while researching what we wanted to do while visiting the Las Vegas area, we wanted to see the Colorado River and Hoover Dam area from a more personal experience. We had the opportunity to meet with their personnel and our river guide Justin whom was outstanding and knowledgeable about the area. My personal opinion is using this company and the great staff won’t disappoint. Thank you for the great communication and the great job that was provided during our visit to the area! Jason & Tambra Adams
Mackenzie was amazing and fun, so informative! Thanks for a great family experience! The color of the water was amazing and was a very overall positive experience.
Amazing experience. We were astonished by the views and Ryan our guide was great. We recommend it for eceruine, great activity to get away from the crazyness of the Strip.
We did the Emerald Cove Kayak tour, our guide Chanjira was beyond exceptional!Very educational and relaxing adventure, very different the typical Vegas activities. Highly recommend!
This was such a great experience. It was my first time kayaking and the views were amazing. Our guide was knowledgeable and kept us entertained. Thank you and will definitely do this again!

This trip was so well done. Gorgeous weather. Beautiful scenery and the most refreshing water ever!  Our guide- Burton-did such a fabulous job of educating everyone on kayaking; the history of the area; the local fauna and wildlife. He was also patient with everyone and enthusiastic about the trip. Our group was full of fun humans as well and it ended with a surprise moment in parking lot (right Burton?). We had a blast and would totally do this again.

Our tour guide Abby is the best. This is definitely a worthwhile trip. Evolution and Abby do a great job at just letting the trip be what you want it to be while keeping you safe and informed of the history.

Chanjira and Chris made sure our family had the best time! We had a little bit of wind on our way back from the cove and Chris made me daughter, who was nervous, feel so safe as we made it back. He and Chanjira answered all of our questions and were very knowledgeable. Thank you for the great trip!
It was an amazing experience. Our tour guides (Chanjira and Chris) went above and beyond. I will definitely share the experience with others.

We used Evolution Expeditions for a "deluxe" kayaking trip. Sal picked us up in a very comfortable van, and throughout the trip to the river knowledgably pointed out landscape and other features (like the solar farms that will be necessary when Lake Mead is no longer full enough for Hoover Dam to generate power). When we arrived at the river, other employees had our Kayaks ready to go, and every one of us had our paddles individually adjusted. These are touring kayaks with a rudder which was AWESOME and let me tell you- I saw some of the kayaks other tours used--and I would not want to use them. People were really struggling with those budget boats!We were guided onto the river (between Davis and Hoover dams, so slow water) and stopped for a break about 45 minutes in for snacks and water and to learn about some local plants. We then went to the cave, which is lovely. Wind was coming up so we didn't go further that day, which was a great call. I kayak--and the wind on the way back would have been awful if we had a longer trip.On the way back, we stopped for lunch and snacks and a swim, then worked our way back up river. On the way back toward Vegas, we stopped by a local park where a bunch of bighorn sheep were hanging out.Can't say enough about our professional, fun, knowledgeable guide, the great kayaks, and the trip overall.

We had a great time kayaking on the Colorado river! Our tour guides Burton, Jared, and Dash were outstanding and super informative. The water was refreshing and the views were amazing. Would definitely recommend this activity and company to friends!

Dylan was an amazing tour guide! He told us about the history of the area, educated us on the edible plant life and made the kayak tour super enjoyable with the super soakers.  As a travel agent, I definitely will be recommending your company to any clients that want to visit the area.
Amazing! Very hot day but Jarred our guide was amazing and knew so much!! Cave wasn’t much but rest of the trip was great. Very novice kayaker and still was very nice.
Kristen...there's no better way to stay cool in the desert summer than on the river. Water temps are 53 degrees and the scenery is breathtaking. Thanks for admiring our backyard.

It gets hot in the summer and hydration is crtitcal. Our guides are all WFA certified so they understand how important it is as well. That is why we provide unlimited bottled water for our guests, snacks that re-fuel and optional lunch tours. We also have a blast with our guests having water gun fights with the chilly 53 degree water in the Colorado...what better way to stay cool!
Thanks for joining your guides out in the canyon. Chris and Dash have a great chemistry when it comes to entertaining guests. Thank you for spending time with us.

Highly professional and slick operation on the part of Evolution Expeditions.  Our very knowledgeable and personable guide, Ryan, ensured we learned about the environment and the history of the river, had fun, and a big laugh to boot.  A great way to escape the glitz of LV and to reconnect with nature.

We are sometimes known as the best kept secret because we are only a few miles outside of Vegas, but we are worlds away as far as scenery and overall experience. If you are into nature, wildlife, and serenity, the canyon is the place to be. Sal and Abby have so much to share with their guests. We appreciate you spending your time with us.
Had a great time! Our guide Ryan was awesome. The cave was beautiful and the kids loved it. Highly recommend!!!

just had a fantastic day with Evolution Expeditions.Our guide Abby was fun, witty and informative. The tour was very well organized and they really kept right on schedule. From booking to touring this company really excels at customer service. I am looking forward to doing this again.Steve Roy

Chris is fantastic! He loves entertaining kids on the river and of course having water gun fights to keep everyone cool. We are often impressed with young teens that paddle their hearts out. Great way to get them off the video games and away from social media...just pure outdoor nature...it feeds the soul. Thanks for joining us.

Great day. The water and views were amazing.  Our guide Dash did an amazing job. He was extremely kind and helpful making sure everyone had a fun and safe experience. At one point a guest from another tour fell out of her kayak He did not hesitate to assist her in getting back in the kayak.  The lady was frightened and he was very calming and reassuring towards her. He successfully instructed her on how to re- board her kayak.
Our guides are immersed in the history of the Black Canyon and are true nature enthusiasts. We appreciate you spending your time with us.

The water was amazingly clear and bright green, so cool to see! The cave is fairly small and apparently better to see when it’s sunny. Our guide was amazing, she had extensive knowledge of the local plants and animals! We brought our young kids and she was incredibly patient answering all their questions and playing squirt guns with them. Well worth it!

Evolution Expeditions lived up to the hype and more on our kayaking trip today. Abby, our expedition leader/trip guide, did such an amazing job educating my family and myself on the history of Lake Mead and the area we were kayaking through. Our highlight of the trip was a cave we visited where the water was crystal clear and green like an emerald. I strongly recommend adding this to your trip of things to do if you are visiting Las Vegas!

Spotting bighorn sheep on the river is such a treat. They live in the mountains and often poke their heads out to drink at the river's edge. Our guides have a great knack for seeing them and pointing them out to their guests. Thank you for leaving a review.
Caitlyn...thank you for letting Dash show you the gorgeous section of river we paddle. We appreciate you spending time with us and thank you for recommending us to others.
Chanjira was super lovely and was very informational! Of all the kayak tours I've had the pleasure of having, she has been my best guide
Dylan is an all around guide. A personality that can't be beat and a passion to show guests the time of their lives. So wonderful to hear your experience was top notch!

My husband and I had a fun time. It was about 3 hours on the water - just enough time to enjoy the beautiful scenery without getting too tired. We were lucky enough to catch some big horn sheep up on the steep mountains.

My friend and I decided to do a kayak tour through evolution expedition on our last day in Vegas and it was an amazing experience; 100% worth it! Our group leaders Chris and Ryan were the best! They were very sweet and knowledgeable and helpful throughout our journey.First we were impressed with the kayaks they had available. They had rudders that you could control with feet paddles in the back. We aren’t avid kayakers so this is the first time we saw this and they were a game changer! Kayaking to the cave was very smooth! We had strong winds on our side really helping us breeze through with minimal effort. Getting to the cave took team effort because we had to wait in a line with other kayak groups so we had to latch onto the side of the canyon wall to avoid the wind/current taking us down. Definitely a crazy experience but it really added character to the trip! The cave itself was beautiful, just like what I saw online. Our group leaders also shared a lot of fun facts while we were here. Just a heads up you go in as a group so it’s a bit of a tight squeeze! Leaving the cave required a bit more effort as we were going against the strong winds but we made it through.Overall an experience I will never forget and so grateful we did it! The views were so surreal both kayaking the river and seeing the cave. The overall trip was 4 mi so just be prepared to put in some work, especially if you go on a windy day like us! Shoutout to our amazing guides for making this trip possible and memorable!

Fantastic opportunity to see the Colorada River up close.   Views and picture opportunities were great.  Ryan and Dash were the best guides.  Knowledgeable,  skilled, and funny.  Made for a great adventure.No skill or prior kayaking experience needed.  They showed the ropes and got us all safely going.  Very knowledgeable of the region and history as well as kayaking.  Would do this again for sure!  Evolution Expeditions was really top-notch!

Our tours offer something for everyone. Glad our half day tour sparked your interest to come back and join us on our full day adventure. Ryan and Dash along with all of our guides work hard and love taking people on an amazing journey through the Black canyon.

We had the most amazing experience, one of the best days of our life! The place is out of this world beautiful but our guide Salvatore made it extra special! He was so kind, funny and very very knowledgeable! He was the icing on the cake to the most perfect day!

This was a great way to do something different in Vegas. The guides were knowledgeable, super friendly and helpful! The “line” to get into the cave was really long, especially given that it’s a tiny cave, but the overall experience was great.

Hi Josh,Awesome to hear you had such a great time.  Carson is a wonderful guide and I'm glad he was able to teach you the basics of kayaking.Thanks for spending the day with us and leaving the kind review.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team

A truly beautiful experience!! We were first time kayakers and Carson, our guide, made sure we were comfortable & knowledgeable enough to get to the cave. The photos we took don’t do justice to the actual views; they were amazing!! Huge shout out to Carson— he was personable, smart, funny, patient, and really made the whole experience something to remember!!

We had an awesome experience starting with great weather! Our host Dylan was the best guide ever. Very friendly and super knowledgeable. He provided water and snacks for us but it was his personality that made our experience very rewarding. Thanks Dylan for a great kayaking tour! The views were breathtaking!
Dylan always lucks out seeing big horn sheep, which is such a treat! The scenery can't be beat and what a contrast from the busy LV strip! Glad you spent time with us on the river.

Amazing day kayaking! Ryan was kind, knowledgeable and experienced. He shared information about the area and kept us all together and engaged. The pictures do not do the views justice. A must experience adventure. Highly recommend!
What a great pair those 2 are! They are both full of so much knowledge and have amazing stories to share. Great to hear your time was well spent.
wow! What an awesome review tank you so much.  We love Sal his passion for the river never disappoints.  Come out and see us again next time your are in Las Vegas.-You Evolution Expeditions Team

My brother's wedding was in Vegas, and my other brother and I were in charge of the bachelor party. We purchased the Deluxe package for a group of 9 in early June. We could not have asked for a better experience. Burton picked us up in a van outside of Mandalay Bay and proceeded to give us the history of Las Vegas and the surrounding area as we drove to the launch point. After we arrived, he led us through an incredible tour of the Colorado River and Emerald Cove. We had a blast with the water guns that come with each kayak and joking around with Burton and the other guide. I cannot recommend this experience enough. We were afraid the drive would be a little long for a bachelor party from Vegas, but it was so scenic we did not mind the ~1hr it took to get to the river. There was an opportunity to purchase drinks afterward, and the lunch was great. I look forward to doing the full day tour of the Hoover Dam the next time I am in Vegas.

Hi Lori,Glad you were able to spend the day with us, I defiantly agree the canyon is a great get away from the hustle and bustle of the Strip.  Thank you for leaving such a nice review and hope to see you again soon.
Thanks for the awesome review! Jared is an amazing guide and we are lucky to have him. Hope to see you on the water again soon.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team
I took my ten year old and this was our favorite “Vegas” activity. The water was so beautiful. Our tour guides Ryan and Dash we incredible, kind, funny, and so knowledgeable. 10/10 would do it again.
Hey Nick,Thanks for the awesome review!  Hopefully you can visit us again next time you're out.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team
Great to hear you had a good time, this is truly a magical place. Thanks for the kind review.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team
We are thrilled your family had a memorable day out in nature with us. The sights and sounds in the canyon are so unique and not like anything guests have seen before. Thank you for joining us!

The guides Gina and Abbey were Profesional and new how to keep the trip enjoyable. They respected other tour companies and showed camaraderie with other tour guides. Very good choice if you want a memorable day!!!

Fantastic day on the Colorado river.  We were collected from our hotel by Salvatore our guide and he chatted to us all the way out to the launch point. He gave us so much information and made the trip really fun. It’s a 4 mile paddle but doesn’t feel difficult, as there are ltd of pauses when you can just float.If you’re feeling brave you can swim, but the water is chilly!! It was overcast when we were there which was nice, but the sun popped out just in time for us heading into the emerald cave, which made the water colour pop! Great day overall.
Great to hear you had such a great experience with our crew. And anytime you're back in the area, we'd love to see you again Liz.

My friend and I were on vaca in Vegas for a few days and decide to try something different away from the Strip.  We drove ourselves to the marina, arrived on time, and joined the group for a quick tutorial on how to get in/out of the kayak as well as being fitted for our life jackets.  Once everyone arrived, we were on our way with our guide Gina.  This is such a beautiful place to kayak to get out on the water.  I will say, the water is COLD but I took the plunge anyway.  If you're looking for something outside of Vegas to do and would like an awesome guide, I'd definitely pick Evolution Expeditions!!  BTW....you don't travel through a cave, you just back up into it.

This outfit was amazing in multiple ways! The pickup was prompt, and van was super clean and driver was very knowledgeable of the area and the history of Las Vegas. The guide and their team were very polite and focused on the safety of the customers. Many water breaks and great lunch. Overall perfect outing and Sandjra was the best!! Highly recommend 10/10.
I booked this experience for my friends and family before my wedding in early May. Ryan and Chris were amazing, the kayak tour was fun and informative. Highly Recommended!
Hi Bimal,I am so glad we were able to provide such an amazing experience for you.  Please come see us again next time you are in Vegas.Thanks for the great review!-Your Evolution Expeditions Team
Love that you had a "great trip".  Aaron and Abby are awesome guides, we are very fortunate to have them.Thanks for the great review and hope to see you again soon.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team
Hi JenSo glad to hear you had fun.  Definitely come see us again next time you are in town.Thank you for the kind review.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team

3h hayak tour guided by Salvatore. Kayaks have a rudder driven by foot pedals, very esasy to steer. Tour had one short walking stop where Salvatire explained the local flora, then rowing to the cave. Long queues to wait for pass. Salvatore explained geography and history of surroundings. Swim in Colorado river. Great experience.
The trip was amazing! Our tour guide David was helpful and informative pointing out wildlife and points of interest. Worth the money. I highly recommend!
Great tour guide. Scenic views. Moderate difficulty. The drive was longer than expected. The the wait outside the grotto was also long as expected.
Sal is great, we are lucky to have him.  Thanks for spending the day with us and thank you for the great review. Hope to see you again soon.
Thanks for the awesome review!  Sal is a great guide, we are lucky to have him.  Come see us again next time you are in Las Vegas.

The view along the Colorado River was amazing! And our guide Burton was absolutely so helpful! The wind was too strong that we had a hard time paddling, Burton towed our kayak with his kayak and we successfully made it to the shore!

Loved our guide team of Salvatore and Jared!! super knowledgeable about everything(flora & fauna, etc....) and really great guys, too. the beauty of the scenery was amazing...very wonderful kayaking trip. I am not a very physically fit person but I managed this activity well. I highly recommend this to everyone.

We (my husband, two boys - ages 13 and 14 and myself) just finished the Emerald Cave Express Kayak Tour.  This tour consistently has 5 star ratings, but I don’t get it. The folks at Evolution Expeditions were very nice people. My so/so review is more about the experience itself which we paid handsomely for. This did not feel like we were on the river at all. It felt like a reservoir / small lake with very choppy water and strong winds. The Emerald Cave is NOT impressive. It’s tiny. The pictures you see on the ad are the extent of it. It’s not deep at all. It is about the depth of two kayaks end to end. We had to wait over 30 minutes just to simply back our kayak in to see it. The water looks the same as it does throughout the rest of the river.  It was hard work paddling back as there were strong headwinds and very choppy, water with waves.
Thank you for taking the time to write the kind review.  Great to hear you had good experience.  Next time you are out come try our full day tour that launches from the base of the Hoover Dam.
So glad to hear you had a great time. We are truly lucky to have this treasure in our back yard.  Thanks for the kind review and hope to see you again soon.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team
Our guide Jared was informative and fun. We had a great time with this tour company and highly recommend using them for a great day on the water.

Hi Gordon,Thank you for the kind review. Ryan is a great guide and we are lucky to have him. Safe travels back home and hope to see you again next time you are in Las Vegas.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team

Maaly and Tahani... We have been trying to reach out to you ever since your booking first came through to us to get the additional information we needed to complete your booking. We never received a response and would love to connect with you. We pride ourselves on excellent customer service and professionalism. We strive to make every guest experience top notch. Please contact our office so we can discuss your experience with you. Thank you. 702-259-5292

What a wonderful excursion!!  Everything was great. Pickup from the strip was seamless. The ride in was comfortable and interesting - Chanjira, our guide, was full of interesting information. The kayaking itself was so fun.  Lots of laughs. Not too strenuous. Beautiful water and views.  The cave was great. We can’t say enough about Chanjira. She was such a delight. You could clearly tell she loved what she was doing. She was funny and kind. And she brought lots of snacks and water - you can’t beat that!!Oh, last thing. My husband was disappointed that we did not see any bighorn sheep during our ride. So Chanjira pulled off the road on the way home and took us to a cute little park that is home to a herd of wild, bighorn sheep.  Just so we could see them. 10/10 would recommend this company and bonus if your guide is Chanjira.

Sal and Ryan were amazing guides! They were very knowledgeable about the area and the different plants and animals that we saw. The kayaks were very comfortable and easy to navigate. I highly recommend this company and this tour!

My family and I had a great time kayaking the Colorado River in the Black Canyon. It was beautiful and our guide, David, was so nice and helpful. We took the shuttle from Las Vegas. We definitely recommend the Emerald Cove Tour.

My family and I had a wonderful time during this tour.  We were able to view a few wild animals such as a sheep, bald eagle and water snake.  The kayaks were well maintained and we had no problems navigating it. It was relaxing and the water was refreshing. Thank you!

Where to start, my friends and I decided to take the Emerald Cave Express Kayak tour and we are glad to say this tour with Ryan and Sal was beyond what we expected. From the start they were great at giving us instructions and teaching us the do’s and dont’s on the kayak. Once we were in the water, they made sure the group stayed engaged. The water squirters made it so fun so please make sure you use them.We saw a few eagles and rattlesnakes near the water, and they both also shared some history of the area. The snacks were definetly needed lol and lunch was great. Take as many pictures as you can but Ryan will also be taking a few, including a group pic from inside the cave. Overall the experience was great, I will be taking it again. I suggest you do as well. Like they mentioned, in 50-60 years that river we were kayaking in, will become a hiking trail and you do not want to miss that opportunity. Thank you so much Ryan and Sal, see you soon!
So glad you had an "Amazing" trip.  Thanks for spending the day with us, Burton loves to show our guests the magic of the canyon.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team

Burton was the bomb.com.  Expert all the way.  Great conversation about the river and wildlife. I can not imagine a better tour than we had.   Ask for Burton.  !!  The river was wonderful.   We drove in and met Him there .

This was a great experience! Our tour guide was fun, knowledgeable, and prepared. They kept us hydrated, safe, and entertained. I was incredibly impressed with how calmly and quickly they jumped into action when one of the kayaks flipped over - first making sure that the kayakers were safe, and then right sizing the boat and getting the participants back in it.

Great experience! Dylan was our guide and did an excellent job of educating everyone on kayaking and the history of the area. We had one couple turn over their kayak and he handled the situation very professionally. Would definitely go again.
It was a great experience! Our guide Dylan was amazing! He told us some nice facts and had enough water to keep us hydrated. It was an amazing day

Thank you for the 10/10!  Sal is a great guide and never fails to give a great customer experience.  Thanks for spending the day with us and hope to see you again soon.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team

This kayak trip is top notch!  Saw wildlife, beautiful views, and swam in the crystal clear Colorado River! The office called me to verify size and equipment for me. And even gave me a wake up call to make sure I was going to make my shuttle. Best of all was our tour guide Salvatore, great hospitality, put us in spots for the best views and wildlife, and was very knowledgeable of history and facts with questions I had.

My sister and I had an amazing time kayaking on the Colorado River!  The Emerald Cave was absolutely beautiful. Our guide, Aaron (aka, A-A-Ron or River Cowboy) was fantastic! He was so knowledgeable about the area and a joy to spend the day with. I would definitely recommend this tour!

We had a great time with our guides and learned a lot about the local scenery. Really liked kayaking on the Colorado river, lunch was nice, highly recommend doing it if you get the chance. Take the two-person kayak single kayaks tend to flip over.

Dylan was a great guide. His passion for the area was clear, and he shared lots of great information. His fun loving attitude made the trip a blast. He made sure to take care of all of the guests on the trip and be a great host. Dylan was able to balance safety concerns and guest experience expertly.
Wow, thank you for the awesome review and spending the day on the river with us. Glad to hear you had a great time with 2 of our best guides Chanjira and Sal.-Your Evolution Expeditions Team

We came to Las Vegas to join my parents for their 20+ years Anniversary. My dad loves to kayak, so I found this tour. It was amazing. We all really enjoyed ourselves. Gina and Stephen were great tour guides; very informative, funny, caring and they connected with everyone.  You also get to do a little hike and learn about the area. They're also very helpful, thanks Gina for helping someone back in their kayak, haha. Be prepared, the water is cold (high 50°s) and you'll have to grab onto the side of the mountain to wait in line to get in the cave, so have a good grip and remember TEAMWORK

Really great activity to do with the Family , great team to supervise the trip up to the cave . We highly recommend this activity nearby Las Vegas , easy and quick access with a drop stop in Boulder City before the activity of any items are missing for the adventure

As a first time kayaker I was very nervous that I was in over my head.  After a brief instruction on how to manipulate the rudders and how to stabilze the kayak we set off.  I expected to complete the trip having seen pretty scenery but Burton, our guide, was full of knowledge regarding the rock formations and local plants making the trip so much more than what I expected.  After pointing out fault lines, explaining how wildlife can access life giving nutrition from seemingly inedible prickly cacti and telling us stories on how early settlers survived we arrived at the Emerald Cove.  The view was stunning and spectacular.  On the return trip Burton stopped for snacks and water then took us on a short hike explaining the medicinal and useful properties the local plants provide.  Ask him to show the trick about the creosote plant...it will blow your mind.  We completed the trip with so much more than I had anticipated.  Burton was spectacular and will definitely request him as our guide for my next trip (hopefully next year!!!). Thank you Evolution Expeditions.  All lof your guides were helpful to the tourists and each other.  It appeared to me that it your staff are family to each other.
Salvatore was really great! The day was beautiful and the tour was a lot of fun. It was interesting to learn a little about the area we were kayaking in also.

Such an amazing trip with a fantastically knowledgable and funny guide in Chanjira! Was good fun going in tandem kayaks and being able to get our whole group into the Emerald cave together. Would 100% recommend
Chanjira was fantastic!  We had a great trip.  The scenery did not disappoint.  The river was as emerald as advertised.  Evolution Expedition was totally professional.  Will definitely do again!
Awesome experience! Definitely give it a go if you're in the Las Vegas area and want to see some beautiful nature.
Our trip with Sal and David was just incredible. A trip of a lifetime for us from Ohio and Nevada. They were very helpful and professional and highly recommend Evolution Expeditions.

This was an amazing tour.  Our tour guide Holmes was the BEST.  He was so friendly, knowledgeable , and patient.  He went above and beyond to share highlights during our kayaking tour and during our travels back and forth to Las Vegas.  The company made it very easy to schedule pick up areas and times.  I would highly recommend using this company for your kayaking adventure, and don’t forget to ask for Holmes.

This was such a fun trip! Our guide, Holmes, was awesome, funny, and knowledgable. He took his time making sure everyone was comfortable in their kayaks and shared lots of history, kayaking tips, and jokes during our trip. We even got to see an example of how to right a kayak after another person flipped. The Emerald Cave was the highlight- luckily we got to the cave at the perfect time as the wait wasn't long. I highly recommend doing this tour
Love the kayak tour! Guides were professional and friendly. What a great memory! Would definitely do it again!

Our guides Chris and Holmes were wonderful and attentive to all in our group. The snacks they shared were delicious and it was nice to have a bottle of water waiting in our kayaks. This excursion is worth it because the water is beautiful and this tour company does an excellent job.
Great trip with beautiful scenery!  Ryan and Kenzie were attentive and informative and made the trip a pleasure.

We had a great time with our teen and tween in double kayaks. Aaron and David were our guides and told us so much about the area’s history while keeping us safe. I saw the other tours getting ready to go out and definitely recommend this one—they just seemed more attentive and experienced. There were some people who had never kayaked before and this was not a problem. You also don’t have to be super fit to do it. The emerald cave only fits a few kayaks at a time and the line was long, so be prepared for that. We also didn’t see any sheep or eagles, but it may have been a bit chilly for that. The whole thing took about 4 hours. Some days might be shorter with less wind or a more experienced group. Highly recommend checking it out. Next time I’d like to do the one that starts at Hoover Dam.

This trip was incredible. My son and I had a blast traveling the 4 miles in a kayak.  Our tour guide, Sal, was a wealth of knowledge. We are still impressed with the plants that released a smell when you breathe on it!!  The pictures on Google make it seem like you travel through caves… But the cave is more like a grotto. You cannot travel through them, but you stop in a small Inlet in the mountain and then travel back. That said, the scenery and history of the Hoover dam and its architect are fascinating and the trip with “Evolution Expeditions” is well worth your time while in Las Vegas.Our tour guides story with the ducks was hilarious!

This was our second time doing this Kayak tour. Our first time was April 2022 and it was a nice experience. Our guide let us hang a bit to take pictures near cave and gave snacks while kayaking then Straight back to shore. This time around April 2023 our guide Xander and Sal took us to a little spot to have a snack picnic and walked us to a great view on top.

Really enjoyed this activity with my family. Our guides Xander and Sal were awesome. They took the time to show us how to kayak. Very patient and encouraging. Also enjoyed the little facts they told us along the way. Would definitely do this activity with this company again.

Kayaking the Colorado River with Ryan was the highlight of our father-daughter college graduation trip.  Ryan was knowledgeable and encouraging. He kept the group of seven paddlers in five kayaks together, on task, and happy.  We could not have asked for a better experience.
Staff members are very professional, knowledgeable, courteous and loved the experience!  The kayaks are in great shape.  Staff members brought snacks.  Thank you!
We had an amazing time on our kayak excursion today! Our tour guide, Holmes was amazing, informative and super helpful! Would definitely recommend this excursion to others!

Evolution Expeditions was an amazing kayaking tour guide and organizer. I originally booked my trip almost a year prior but had to cancel due to me getting sick. They said they would hold my booking for when I was available. When I rebooked my trip with a girlfriend, they called in advance to let me know the original date would be windy. So they accommodated us to go the next day and last minute booked another friend that wanted to come along. They had snacks and drinks for us during the tour and they also provided lunch. It was cloudy so the cove was a little dark, but overall we had a great trip.

Burton, our tour guide was FANTASTIC from start to finish.The whole experience from booking to the trip was simple, pain free and we were kept informed the whole time.This was a great trip whether you are a novice(like me) or an experienced kayaker.Burton was very knowledgeable and nothing was tooling trouble.Thanks Evolution Expedition and thanks Burton.

Kudos to Evolution expeditions on another great trip! Once again the whole thing went off so smoothly and I have heard only positive feedback from my friends. The guides were as usual excellent, knowledgeable and friendly and also oh so funny!!This was our fourth time and most have said they would do it again next Spring, myself included. Nothing but good things to say about the company and the people. See you all again next year!

We were a little worried as we are an older couple with no kayaking experience. But it turned out to be a wonderful experience and a beautiful day. Our guides, Burton and Xander, were very helpful and accommodating.  They had a lot of knowledge and experience and made the day one we will not forget. Highly recommend

Wonderful kayak trip.  Our guide, Ryan, was awesome, patient and knowledgeable!  The water was beautiful… and our half mile hike was very informative! . Ryan’s tips for this inexperienced kayaker were very helpful and reassuring.  I highly recommend Evolution Expeditions and Ryan!   Thank you!

Thank you for leaving a review and Gina really is amazing at helping folks feel like confident paddlers by the end of the day. David it was such a joy to have you and Dylan on tour! I appreciated your questions and hope you enjoyed your visit to the dam.- Gina

We loved our kayak trip! Our guides Burton and Justin were excellent in getting us ready for the trip, very friendly, professional and made sure everyone was taken care of and had a good time. They were also very knowledgeable of the history the area and plants etc.The scenery is spectacular and such a nice break from the city.This tour was the perfect duration to be able to get back for early dinner and a show as well.Highly recommend this trip and our guides
Chanjra, Ryan and Dylan were great guides. We had an amazing day filled with fun and laughter. We highly recommend this experience.

Wonderful trip down the Colorado River with friends! We had great tour guides, Chanjira, Ryan and Dylan. The weather was perfect and the scenery was amazing. If you go in the later part of the day that is when you will see the emerald cave show it’s sparkle and light green color. Not a trip to kiss if you want to get outdoors.

Just an amazing trip in an unbelievable location!  Like traveling though Mars!  And the guides Arron, Makensie, David, and Zach all were super helpful, knowledgeable, and extra kind to our young boy!  Highly recommend you stop drinking in Vegas and go get outside!  It was well worth the time!Thank you

Thank you for spending your time with us in the canyon. The Emerald Cave is just the cherry on top of a beautiful day in the canyon. It is much smaller than people expect. We explain it as being "a small cut out of the mountain" that holds a lot of history.

Wow..it was amazing.  Our tour guide Chanjira was knowledgeable about the area, the history of Willow Beach.  She was friendly and most of all cared about the safety of everyone.  She was so calm and really awesome especially for those of us that are newbies to kayaking.  Her patience is unmatched.  She is really a wonderful instructor and guide.  I had a couple of friends come to town to experience this and they were amazed.  It was relaxing and the water wow..crisp, cool and clean.  I highly recommend Chanjira to all who would like to experience this phenominal getaway from the city.  She was also knowledgeable about the birds that inhabit the area as well as all of the trees, bushes and floras.

Amazing scenery. Wonderful adventure. Our guide Burton was helpful, knowledgeable, encouraging and so engaging. It was truly an absolutely perfect day! Easy enough for beginners and interesting enough for experienced paddlers. Nothing but great things to say about this experience.

Such a great time out on the water, a great escape from the strip, and knowledgeable guides Jared and Steven were awesome on everything from geology to horticulture.  Saw big horned sheep and an eagles nest. The caves were great too! Thanks so much guys — we had such a relaxing day. Would definitely visit again.

Lovely paddle down the Colorado river with Ryan who was a really great guide. Good instructions for newbies. Great historical background on the area. We learned about local flora and fauna. Loved the Emerald Cave. Highly recommended.

Ryan was a fantastic guide. He was extremely professional, knowledgeable and fun. We were the only kayakers on the river, the weather was perfect and the river was beautiful. We loved the history of “Bob” and his cable car. Can’t wait to come back and do the 12 mile.
Jessica...we are so happy you enjoyed your time with us on the river. Come back and see us next time you're out this way.

Our guide Ryan was knowledgeable and patient. It was great for beginners. The scenery was beautiful. Guide gave us a little history and environmental information. The whole day was enjoyable and great to get out of strip.

Susan...you nailed it...Chanjira loves what she does. She is one of the most positive, energetic, passionate guides on the river and we are so lucky she is part of our close knit team. Thank you for positing such a lovely review.
Thanks for joining us Chris and for leaving a review. Glad the river and canyon met your expectations and was the highland of visiting the greater LV area.

Amy...your teens are brave dipping in the chilly waters of the Colorado River. Spending time in the canyon in the winter months is amazing. The temps never get too cold and the river is never crowded. Next time you're out this way, join us on our full day tour, it's 7 hours and the sights and adventure are beautiful and fun.

Beautiful day for the activity. Kurt was a wonderful instructor and guide, great conversations, funny person, and made us all feel welcomed and cared for. He took and shared the photos he took of all of us and the videos he took beneath the surface! He made the trip fun and educational for all of us that attended and made this one to remember. Thank you so much for having us and introducing my partner and I to a new activity.!

Wife and I took this kayak tour with Evolution Expedition on the Colorado River and loved it.  Our guide Ryan did a great job from orientation, safety, sharing knowledge of the canyon, local flora, and keeping us on pace to experience all we could without feeling rushed. Highly recommend this tour!

Booked the excursion while on a trip to Vegas. I have to say, unlike the impression I got from the pictures, the actual Emerald Cove was smaller than what I imagined, and we had to wait to get in (could only stay in the cove for a few minutes). Even though this was the case, it was still a great trip. The views while kayaking more than made up for it. Our guide was friendly, patient, and very knowledgeable. If your an active visitor, and you have never experienced this before, I would recommend giving this a try!!!

we had the pleasure of taking the tour with the best guy you have!!Ian made the trip fun and personalhe made sure to interact with every single couple and ask them great questions about themby the end of the trip he made everyone feel personalwe go to Vegas every single year and will definitely be back to that trip because of him

We actually drove to willow beach from Laughlin . We had an amazing experience with an amazing guide Michael. He showed us all the highlights of the canyon but also was very engaging and answered everyone’s questions.

Absolutely phenomenal time. Our tour guide, Katelyn, made the trip even better. She provided such a bright and positive energy to the adventure. The water was beautiful the entire time, the air smelled so good, the views were breathtaking, and the facts that Katelyn told us about during the time in the water were so cool. Would 100% recommend.

Very nice kayak trip for beginners and experienced kayakers! Highly recommend! We kayak frequently and both of us really enjoyed the views along the Colorado River. We intentionally chose the early morning tour (8AM) to beat the heat (and are glad we did!), but be aware that the group leader recommends later tour times for the best views. The sun does not shine into the water or Emerald Cave in the early morning hours.Others in our group had never kayaked before and seemed to enjoy themselves. No one in our group flipped or fell into the water, even with one person showing off and standing on their kayak for a moment. All of us beached our kayaks and went for a swim near the end of the float.We drove an hour from the Las Vegas strip across Hoover Dam over to Willow Beach for this early morning kayak trip. We left our hotel around 6:30AM and crossed the dam around 7:05AM. We exited the highway around 7:20AM and arrived at the Willow Beach marina around 7:40AM where we purchased some last minute supplies (dry bag and water shoes). We were kayaking on the Colorado River with our group of about 8 kayaks by 8AM.Our tour guide pointed out landmarks and told many stories as we paddled a few miles up stream (toward Hoover Dam). Everyone backed their kayaks into the small Emerald Cave for a photo op and more stories/history. At that point, we were about 10 miles downstream from Hoover Dam. After our cave visit, our group paddled back downstream toward the marina and stopped for a swim in a small cove before returning to the marina.Our group leader had all of the kayaks, paddles, and life jackets ready for us when we arrived. He gave newcomers paddling advice and other general advice before helping everyone adjust the foot stops in each kayak and showing proper technique for sitting inside the kayaks. When we returned, our group leader only asked that we take any items/trash that we brought with us and he took care of loading all kayaks, paddles, etc after we left.After we left the marina, we stopped at Hover Dam for about an hour. Always great sight-seeing and photo opportunities! There is no charge to drive into the dam area and stop at various overlook areas. Consider planning a dam tour on your way back to Las Vegas if you have a few hours to spare.

Thank you for leaving us a review. We appreciate you spending your day on the river with us!-Evolution Expeditions Team

We had a beautiful, hot & sunny day on the water.  Our guides (Johnny & Caitlyn/Kaylen???---sorry ;) were great.  There were 14 boats in our group w a variety of kayaking experience.  The guides were patient & conversational.  This is a pretty easy day of paddling for anyone who is remotely fit.  Great views and photo ops.  We saw one big horn sheep and one tiny lizard....other than than, lots of mountains and beautiful emerald green water.  Water was great to cool off in during the beach break, and the extra water and snacks provided by Evolution were much appreciated!  We took the 10:30 am trip and had a short wait (<15 min) to get into emerald cave.  Recommendations:  bring a hydroflask (or some other water container that keeps cold); they will supply you with extra water, but it is nice to dump it into a container w ice to keep it cold!  Also:  get a light colored SPF shirt--the sun is hot, and you will be in  it for hours.  It is much more enjoyable without roasting;).  Evolution called me the day before to discuss tandem vs. solo Kayaks (we are a family of 4 w 13 yo and 19 yo daughters).  We elected to go w tandem boats based on their recommendation.  We've rowed before and would have been fine in solo boats, but the tandems made it much more enjoyable, especially around a bunch of novice boaters.

Phenomenal tour. We were 10 and went early in the morning and the timing worked perfectly. Jalen was our primary guide (I don't think our 2nd guide works there anymore but was also great) throughout the tour. We had some last minute changes with single vs double kayaks and they were kind enough to accomodate although I'm sure it was painful. We made 2 stops along the way, the weather was great and the guides gave us plenty of facts about the area and played photographer for all of us. The overall group was 12 and it was the right size. We came back right before noon when a flood of other groups were on the water thankfully heading in the opposite direction. Definitely recommend this tour company.
Thank you for leaving us a review. The river truly is a magical place to spend a day away from the strip!-Evolution Expeditions Team

Ashley & Blade were our guides and they both were awesome🫶🏻 I was a little scared because I don’t know how to swim but they made me feel super comfortable with their knowledge of kyacking. We had so much fun & we will definitely be doing this again👍🏼
Was nervous at first but it was easy and Ryan our guide was there reassuring us that he was there to help every step of the way!! Beautiful sight the entire expedition!
Thank you for leaving us a review. We are so happy we got to show you the beauty of the black canyon and Colorado river.-Evolution Expeditions Team

Thank you for leaving us a review! Ryan and the rest of our team, sure do enjoyed being able to share the history of Colorado River to all of their guests.-Evolution Expeditions Team

We loved it! 2 adults 4 children… youngest was 3! Not too long kept all the kids attention.. our guide Ashley was amazing!! The kids loved her! And she brought snack and water! Kayaks were very nice and well equipped.. worth every penny!

We went with the Evolution Expedition Group to Emerald Cove, Kayaking Experience on July 3rd 2022 and it was an awesome experience! Our guides, Blake and John are the best! Highly recommend! They are not only very knowledgeable and professional, but also very caring, friendly, and fun.
Emerald cave if amazing and our tour guide, Skylar, made the trip fantastic! Couldn’t have asked for a better a guide or a better trip. 11/10 experience and my favorite part of my Vegas vacation.

Amazing tour!! Our guides Johny and Zean were great!! They were very attentive and helpful. They had snacks and water for everyone.The way back was a little bit hard because of the wind so be prepared for a little workout.
We love to hear about never before kayakers trying it out and loving it. The canyon is very beginner friendly with the calm, flat water. Glad you had a great time.
We love that you used the word joyful to describe Kaytlyn...that is her! She always has a smile on her face and is so enthusiastic about the river and guiding. Thanks for the great review.

Our kayak tour with Ryan, our guide, was terrific. We did the 10:30 am tour and we were a party of eight. There were four adults and four teenagers who are amateur kayakers. Ryan gave great instruction and was very informative. The temperature outside was about 105° but the water was in the 50s. The 2 1/2 hour tour was just right. The outfitter provided water and snacks and gave us an opportunity to get out of the kayaks and take some beautiful pictures for a few minutes. Would definitely recommend this for novice kayakers and young children and amateur kayakers. Ask for Ryan. He’s great and very patient.
From beginning to end we had a superb experience with our guide Ryan! His knowledge and patience was immensely appreciated. Will definitely be recommending this experience! Thank You!

Our guide, Esther, was AMAZING! She gave us lots of fun facts on the way to the river, and she was right on time for hotel pickup. She even stopped for those who needed to use the bathroom prior to the intended stops. The river itself is just beautiful. Esther gave some helpful guidance on how to kayak successfully, and although it was my first time, it was easier to pick up than I expected! We spent about 2-2.5 hours on the river itself and saw birds, coyotes, and big-horned sheep. The only disappoint of the day was the cave itself. It is really small, and you will spend more time waiting in line to get into the cave than actually in the cave itself. I would still highly recommend this tour for those looking for an outdoor activity away from the strip. It is a workout for sure, but the scenery is hard to beat!
Thank you for your kind review. We are glad you enjoyed your time on the river with Charlie, Andy, and the rest of the Evolution Expeditions crew.-Team Evolution Expeditions

Loved this trip. I am a recreation coordinator for the employees at The Oasis in Death Valley and I took a group of employees on this trip and we had such a great time!!
