They were both fun and full of interesting facts. We will definitely be doing this again a couple more times this summer!
Esther is hands down one of our best guides, we are lucky she's on our team. Thank you for spending your day on the water with us.-Evolution Expeditions Team
This is great to hear, thanks for the awesome review and recommendation! We are thrilled to hear Esther showed you the beauty of the Black Canyon.-Evolution Expeditions Team

Thank you for this awesome review! Missy is truly one of our best guides and we are thrilled to hear she made your trip memorable.-Evolution Expeditions Team

Come laugh, joke around, and enjoy nature!

This is definitely worth it! The service was great and the water will take your breath away! Excellent scenery!
Ryan and Blade we're amazing instructors and knowledgeable. I had a great time kayaking and exploring and they made the experience fun. Will definitely do this tour again.
Tony we are thrilled to hear this was the highlight of your trip. Kayaking is so much better than the casinos, at least we think so hehe. Next time you are in Vegas check out our full day tour!

My husband and I enjoyed the Emerald Cave Express trip. As novice paddlers the trip was an easy 2 miles up and 2 miles back in a tandem kayak. Our guide, Ashley, was experienced, knowledgeable and patient. We never felt rushed and she eagerly shared her knowledge of the area. The water was 53 degrees but felt wonderful given the hot temperatures. We were given bottled water and stopped on a small beach to eat snacks the tour provided and swim in the chilly water. The company was very organized and I would strongly recommend this trip. Dress appropriately, bring sunscreen, put your phone in a water proof item and have fun! Oh, and the kayaks have small storage compartments for items.
Ashley we are so happy to hear that Missy provided you with an excellent tour. The river is such an amazing way to escape the craziness of the strip!-Evolution Expeditions Team
Scotty thank you for leaving us review. Missy truly is one of our best guides with outstanding vocal cords lol! Come see us again soon! -Evolution Expeditions Team

A few years ago we relocated to Atlanta G.A this would be our first time back in 5 years!! Looking for something new and exciting for my sister and I to do we searched the web and came across kayak Emerald Cave Express. nervous yet filled with excitement we booked it. BEST DECISION EVER!!! Our tour guides Zayne and Michael were amazing. So personable and welcoming. Will definitely return!!!!. I strongly suggest if you’re in the Vegas area looking for a get away and you come across kayak emerald you, the family and kids PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE do not give it a second thought you will not be disappointed

What a great way to spend half or a full day.  Highly recommend for both locals and visitors.  I also highly recommend asking for Michael Baser, what an awesome tour guide, he is fun, engaging, and knowledgeable of the history of the Colorado river.

This was a great trip. Michael and Jonny were fabulous guides. I am an older participant (70 years old) and Michael was always around making sure I was able to get in and out of the kayak. If you don't have great arm strength, make sure that you do a tandem kayak with someone who can help paddle. There was no way I could have done this without my granddaughter's help. Don't do this tour just for the cave. It is not the highlight of the trip. The water and scenery were the stars. We had a group of 4 people, and we thoroughly enjoyed it. Michael even took pictures of individual kayaks and of the group and texted them to us. Getting photos without an extra charge - what a great concept. The kayak had a waterproof compartment ti out your bag with keys, wallet, etc. I highly recommend this trip.
Loved Blade our guide & loved the time on the water.  Paddling through the canyon was incredible. It was a good day of adventure.

This was a great morning activity to start the day & we left feeling great (and a little tired)!! The water was beautiful! Definitely need to check It out & hopefully you’ll get lucky with them as your tour guides!

we did the kayaking 3 hour activity and it did not disappoint. Michael and Johnny were our guides and they were great. They were informative and interacted with the group and made the tour even more enjoyable.  I give this tour 10/10.
Esther and Ashley led an amazing trip. They were both entertaining and fun, and the trip had incredible views without needing to over work yourself.

Beautiful day, highly recommend the early morning trip, very peaceful and not crowded. Cave is underwhelming, still cool but doesn’t look like the pictures online. Our guide Skylar was awesome, pointing out vegetation and wildlife. Kayaking was not difficult, kayaks very easy to maneuver and Skylar made sure you knew what to do. Great way yo spend the morning!

Awesome sceneries of Colorado River. Weather was absolutely boiling but everything went well. Nice lunch and also water and hydrate was enough. Our guide Missy was positive and energic person, lots of fun.

Did the 8am kayak tour with Skyler and it was amazing! The weather was EXTREMELY hot, rising to about 109, so I’d highly suggest going early in the day if you can. Equipment was 10/10, perfect conditions & we had a great time. We drove our ourselves and met the tour at the location. Bus was extremely easy to find. I would definitely recommend to everyone wanting this experience.
Our guide Michael was great! Fun, knowledgeable, and he knew how to get people back into their kayaks after falling out. No man left behind!

Amazing kayak trip to Emerald Cove with Ashley.  Wonderful guide!Very hot temperatures that day but the water temperatures is cool to keep you cooled down. Would advise an early trip so as not to be too hot.

We took at 4 hour kayak trip including a short hike and the Emerald Cave. Along the way we saw Big Horn Sheep Grazing on the mountainside. Our guide, Michael, was very knowledgeable about current and historical information about the River. He is very safety conscious, especially with out less experienced kayakers. Although the temps were 110 degrees, the water was cool and we were not uncomfortably hot. Wear a hat and water shoes-the River is very muddy. We ordered lunch and it was a great shady picnic!
We had an amazing time kayaking to Emerald Cave!  The views are breathtaking.  Our guide, Charlie, with Evolution Expeditions was great and made our experience that much better!

The Emerald Cave tour was really fun and a pretty good workout too.  Ashley was our tour guide and she is awesome - giving us some history of the river and cave, providing drinks and snacks, and taking some good photos of each each participant and family/friend group.  I recommend!

Had a great time in the river. We went on Memorial Day, and thus, a lot of kayakers were in the water. There was a line of kayaks getting into the cave. It was pretty difficult as a beginner to stay with my group and backing into the cave. Skyler our guide was really patient with me and coached me through when I had difficulties. One thing to note that sets this company apart is that they have all the greatest gear and kayaks for a fraction of the price. Their kayaks have rudders in the back that you control with your feet. Definitely makes a difference when steering. Their life jackets were also nice and slim compared to the other company I’ve booked through. The tour itself was pretty quick, got out to the cove, had to wait in line a bit, then got to a beach shore on the way back and rested for five minutes before getting back to the marina. I would’ve liked to spend more time in the water or at the beach to rest and enjoy the scenery, but I guess that’s what you get as an “express” trip.

We had the best time on our tour today. Esther was amazing. She was knowledgeable about everything and very patient. She explains things clearly. The nature was breathtaking. I would recommend the tour to anyone and everyone.

Brianna we are thrilled to hear you spent your special day on the water with us! Kayaking definitely is the best way to spend a birthday. (At least we think so) Esther truly is an outstanding guide, we are happy she made your trip memorable. Come celebrate with us next year! -Evolution Expeditions Team

Esther was amazing and she taught us how to move efficiently and she taught us about the rocks and wildlife. She was very fun to be around and made me forget how hot it was. The water was gorgeous and cooling.

Fabulous kayaking tour.  My family consisted of two college sons, my husband, and me.  Our tour guide, John, was fantastic.  Very easy-going but also very knowledgeable about the various plants, birds, and reptiles along the Colorado River.  Don't know how to kayak?  No worries.  They instruct you on everything you need to know.   We took the Emerald Cave Express tour which consisted of a 2-mile kayak trip up and a 2-mile kayak trip back on the Colorado River.   We stopped once along the tour to see interesting old ruins. Then continued on to the turnaround point which was Emerald Cave.  Just beautiful. We opted for single kayaks (easier for us to use) but there are tandems also. Wear a sun hat, swim shirt and swim shorts and sunscreen then enjoy your tour.  Wish we were there now.

10/10 that is outstanding! Chanjira is hands down one of our best guides, we are so lucky she is on our team. Come back and see us again soon! (Don’t forget you can request her as your guide!)-Evolution Expeditions Team

Thanks for your recommendation! Our guides love being able to show off the beautiful Black Canyon to all their guests! -Evolution Expeditions Team

Xander was a great guide for a bunch of kayak newbies from Atlanta. He was really patient with our large group especially since we had a couple of incidents and challenges. A great day on the water with Jaylyn & Skyler. They were great guides. The company had great communication before the trip and it was an easy drive on our own to the meeting spot.

Great family activity, guides were kind enough to provide extra water when we didn’t bring enough. Scenery was beautiful and the 4 mile/3 hours was perfect for our family of 4 (kids 11 and 14). This challenging tour was very well planned and our guides were terrific and knowledgeable. Highly recommend. Climbing the ladder to the hot springs is scary!! Wear nonslip water does. Hot springs is a treat

Had a great day on the day  river! Our guides Aaron and Zane were awesome. Their knowledge of the area made the trip very interesting.  They were very patient with rookie paddlers and made the trip a lot of fun. I would recommend this fun filled excursion
This is great to hear! We love reading about how much fun our guests had. On your next adventure check out our full day tour!-Evolution Expeditions Team

Wow! What an amazing experience. Beautiful scenery. Amazing guides. Good friends. A well organized trip. Our guides Xander and Jaylin (sp??) we’re very nice. Very helpful and knowledgeable. So happy this finally happened. I had been planning it for over two years. You won’t be disappointed.

The staff at Evolution Expeditions was awesome, great attitudes and charisma. The tour to the emerald cave was nice and fun. My only gripe: they decided to wait for customers that were late, this delayed our tour by about 20 minutes, and thus we could not stop on our way back to do a short hike... please NEVER wait for late customers, this is disrespectful to the customers that arrived on time (90% arrived on time), and in our case we ended up having part of the tour cancelled. Cheers!

A couple of my Monat friends and I decided to have a kayaking adventure while in Vegas. The weather was perfect, the views were stunning, and our guides, Missy & Charli, were absolutely fabulous! Highly recommend.

An amazing visit that was well worth the cost.  The guide was informative and personable the kind of guy I would like to hang out with.  Their equipment was top notch and my some and I enjoyed our day out more than anything we have done in recent memory.
Danielle we are thrilled we were able to share the beauty of the river with you. I will be sure to pass your kind words along to Jalen and Blade!-Evolution Expeditions Team
Thank you for leaving us a review. Come back and Jalen, Blade and the rest of the EEK team soon!-Evolution Expeditions Team

Amazing day kayaking the Colorado River! From the time Chanrija picked us up to the time she dropped us off we had a blast. Kayaking the clear green waters with the desert landscape was spectacular. Chanrija and Aaron were knowledgeable and made the whole adventure an amazing experience. Seeing the baby big horn sheep was definitely a highlight! I would highly recommend booking with Evolution Expeditions!!!
Missy thank you for spending your day on the water with Michael and the rest of the team. I will be sure to pass your kind words along to him. -Evolution Expeditions Team

Perfect break from the resort strip vibe. Xander was very knowledgeable and the flute made the canyon even more majestic. The group was friendly and fun and made it comfortable for a solo paddler. The bald eagle topped it off!
We appreciate you leaving us a review! Skyler is a top notch guide, we are thrilled to hear he took good care of you on the water.-Evolution Expeditions Team
Thanks for leaving us a review. We appreciate you spending your day on the river with us!-Evolution Expeditions Team

Thank you for coming on tour with us! The Black Canyon has spectacular views and beautiful emerald waters. Missy is such a wonderful guide with tons of information about the area. We hope to see you on the water with is again!-Evolution Expeditions Team
Missy was the guide to go with on this trip, super friendly and amazing person. The whole company was amazing! 10/10 recommendation
Thank you for all the kind words! We are so thankful Michael is on our team. Come see Michael and the rest of the EEK team again soon.-Evolution Expeditions Team
Xander was an awesome tour guide. Helped me and made me feel comfortable kayaking for the first time. His flute was also mind blowing. Good time and the highlight of the trip in Vegas!
Awesome Tour Guide with Flute play inside Black Canyon..Highly recommend for anyone wanting to appreciate the beautiful nature of desert landscape ina way you can't see from the road n lookout points
We are so happy you enjoyed your time on tour with Michael. The hot springs are definitely a must see while in vegas!-Evolution Expeditions Team
We are so happy you enjoyed your time with Michael and happy he was able to show off his rescue skills! I will be sure to pass your kind words along to him.-Evolution Expeditions Team

Im not much of a kayaker but I had a wonderful time. Our guides, Jon and Ash were AMAZING! We had a large crew of folks and they went above and beyond. I would definitely recommend this company and trip!
Glad you enjoyed your full day tour with Michael. The hot spring are certainly a great way to relax and let loose!-Evolution Expeditions Team

Thank you for coming kayaking with us again! We are excited to have you on your next journey! Next time you are here check out our full day tour.-Evolution Expeditions Team

We are happy to hear you enjoyed your time on the water with us and had the opportunity to see the wild life! We are sorry to hear the cave was not as you were expecting. We hope to see you on one in the future!-Evolution Expeditions Team

We are so happy to hear you enjoyed your first kayaking trip with Chanjira and Ashley. They are some of the best guides in the biz, and we are so thankful they are on our team. Come see us again soon!-Evolution Expeditions Team

Our tour guide was Xander and he was absolutely wonderful. He was very knowledgeable and showed us so many great spots. The terrain is just beautiful and the experience was well worth the trip out to the dam. I’d recommend this to anyone
Wendy we are so happy you enjoyed your time with Xander. Thanks for leaving us a review, come see us again soon!-Evolution Expeditions Team

The water was beautiful never seen anything like it. It was our first time kayaking and it was super easy to get the hang of no one fell out the whole time. And the best part was probably our guide whom made the trip all around better from telling us little facts to pointing out foxes and eagles and just make it a better experience. Not gonna lie I forgot his name but he was very chill and a great guide.

Thank you for coming out with us for your kayaking adventure to the Emerald cave! Chanjira is so much fun to be on the water with. Sunscreen is definitely an essential to have on the river, however our guides do bring extra in case anyone forgets theirs! We hope to see you on the water again with us soon!-Evolution Expeditions Team

We decided last minute to hop on this Kayaking excursion and it was the best decision I made in Vegas! Chanjira was an amazing guide. Knowledgeable, down to hear, and fun. Beautiful views. The water was too cold for me but the hiking was easy and we got to see some fun wild life. Lunch included sandwich, chips, cookie and a pickle. There were also snacks and water. Would definitely come back.
Great activity for couples, families or people doing a solo trip! Beautiful views and fun experience
Glad to hear Blade and Xander made your trip memorable. We love being able to share the history an beauty of the Canyon to all of our guests!-Evolution Expeditions Team

Aaron was great! We had a blast. Perfect for couples or families alike. The kayaks had rudders which are far superior than ones without. Don’t be tempted by the glass bottom canoes, those are slower and require mor effort to paddle. Also, take the time to climb up the mountains for breathtaking views.

We were group of 10 people in family vacation, it was a windy day so it was very challenger for some of us, we had 3 crew member and all of them were grate, very professional guides ,we felt safe all over the way, they give us some tips and explanation , they even pulled some of us when we were tired , the picture we took were amazing, the moment infront of the emerald cave was awesome and definitely worth the affort , I definitely recommend revolution expedition tour. Thank you guys 😊

This kayak trip was so amazing! Our guides Chanjira and Skylar were so nice and knowledgeable, they gave us tips and tricks about using the kayaks and had a great answer to everyone of our many questions. My father and I had so much fun. I would recommend this trip to anyone. Definitely wear water shoes, it's easier for getting in and out of the kayak. A couple families were on this tour with us and all the kids had a blast. The emerald cave was so cool too. We just can't say enough about this trip. We will be back one day!
It was our first time kayaking and we had a great experience it was so much fun. Missy was a great guide super patient and fun. We will definitely be going back!

Sooo fun!  This was a really fun tour.  I went with a group of 5 friends, and 3 of us chose single kayaks, while 2 rode in a tandem kayak.  The instructions were great, & I felt safe the entire way.  They provided water and granola bars, Goldfish snacks, and juice.  It was quite windy (north winds), which made it a bit of a workout on the way to the beautiful Emerald Cave.  The winds made it an easy ride back.  I now want to try their Hot Springs tour next :).
Charley and Ashley, our guides, were the bomb...very knowledgable and very patient. They guided us down the river and made us all feel very comfortable

I haven't kayaked in a long time, and it was windy that day... so I was a little nervous.  But all throughout I felt that I was in good hands.  The two guides are in the water in their kayaks, and were super helpful when I didn't know what I was doing.
Ashley and Charlie are amazing guides. We are so happy you enjoyed your paddle today and learned some new information on the beautiful Black Canyon. -Evolution Expeditions Team

Maria you and your husband were so much fun to have on tour! It was so much fun seeing Waite explore all the caves along side the river during our paddle. We are so happy we made your first kayaking experience enjoyable, hopefully this is the first of many! Chanjira is so much fun to have on tour. We had a blast all because of Michael. He was patient and helped us get the grasp of kayak. He did a great job on entertaining us all by the information you provided during the tour. I was a little disappointed that we didn’t have the chance to see the glowing green at emerald cave but we arrived there at 10 am. If you wanna see that, go around noon.

We are so happy to hear you enjoyed your first time kayaking with Chanjira! She truly enjoys being able to teach the ways of kayaking to all her guests for their future adventures.-Evolution Expeditions Team

Michael was an attentive and knowledgeable guide who ensured we were well taken care of and enjoying our tour. This particular tour is a great way to see the Colorado River and fully appreciate its importance to us and the environment!
We are so happy to hear Michael made your first time kayaking memorable. Come see us again and show off those new skills!-Evolution Expeditions Team
Tour was great! The weather and river were perfect and we got to see and learn a lot of interesting things. Our tour guide Michael was awesome and anticipated all of our needs.
Thank you Evolution Expeditions. My friend & I had a blast and are already looking to book the longer tour with you guys in May or June. See you guys soon.

This trip was fantastic!  I discovered the kayaking trip while researching things to do in Vegas.  I was planning a trip with my son, and as we enjoy kayaking I thought this might be cool. The communication leading up to the trip was great- the day of our reservation was windy and they reached out the day before to suggest a tandem kayak and I’m so glad they did! The wind was strong and there were a couple of power paddle moments, but it was a beautiful day and we couldn’t have asked for more. It was definitely a bucket list type adventure!
Ashlee was our guide and did a fantastic job. My wife, 17 year old son, and I enjoyed the experience.
This is awesome to hear! I will be sure to pass your kind words along to Michael, come see us again soon!-Evolution Expeditions Team

Nathan, thanks for spending you day on the river with us! The views never get old!-Evolution Expeditions Team
Thanks for spending your day on the water with Michael and Missy. They truly do love sharing the beauty of the canyon and river to their guests.-Evolution Expeditions Team
Thank you for your review and recommendation! We enjoy taking out first-time paddlers, and Skyler is great at getting folks comfortable on the water.

Great to hear that you had an awesome time with us in the Black Canyon. Although it's an active paddle, there still is plenty of time to chill and take in the beautiful scenery.-Team Evolution Expeditions

Thank you for your review! Michael is an exceptional and energetic guide. The snacks, juice, and water are complimentary on ALL tours. So our guests get hangry or dehydrated on us, lol.-Team Evolution Expeditions
Thank you! Our guides go through an extensive training program to ensure that they can answer all of our guests' questions. Quirky info included. Cheers!-Team Evolution Expeditions
Great outdoor experience. Wonderful landscape. And fantastic guides Michael and Skyler. Nobody does it better.

Thank you for your recommendation. We get many folks like yourself who have lived in Las Vegas for many years and are just now getting down to the river to explore. It's never too late!-Team Evolution Expeditions

We had a fantastic time with the guys - Michael and Shay - who clearly love their jobs! We paddled up the Colorado River, took in the sights and experience and had a lovely time along the way.  Dont worry if you are not into water activities or strenuous exercise this is not what this is, the water is very still and calm and the kayaks are easy to move and control, very relaxing and Michael and Shay kept us informed and entertained, loved every second of it, the highlight of my trip to Vegas which must be saying something!

We we very impressed with both Shay and Michael’s enthusiasm for the trip. It was very infectious.  All members of our party had a fantastic experience and cannot recommend this enough as an essential trip when vacationing in area. Shay’s love of Bolder comes across and was well received. It was great craic, loads of fun and really worthwhile experience. Highly recommended.

Loved the kayaking and the 3 neat stops we made.  Michael was very knowledgeable and help or answered our questions.  He was also very patient and made sure we stayed hydrated and supplied lots of snacks.Wear shoes you can do some hiking in.

Michael and Chanjira were excellent guides. I was 1st timer kayaking and they were extremely helpful. My favorite part of the tour was seeing the beautiful views from such a different perspective. Would definitely do this trip again or consider longer more adventurous one if opportunity comes
Chonjira and Michael were awesome guides,very accommodating for our group. I enjoyed my tour with them and would definitely come again!

Amazing day on the water.  The guides are knowledgable and run a smooth operation.  They are trained to know what to do in all circumstances.  They made great calls on excursions and group comfort.   Lunch on a beach is never bad.

I think this was my second kayaking trip in my life and it was really a great great experience. The scenery was spectacular and our guide John was very very nice and knowledgeable. Inside the emerald cave I lost my center of gravity when turning to look at the fault line and the kayak over turned. All was ok but the water was super cold and John kept me calm and was right there to help me get back in. Great great trip and i will highly recommend your tour company to many many people. Thank you so much Anthony Macagnone NYC

My favorite part was experiencing the incredibly scenic views while hanging out with a fun group of people. Our guides Chanjira and Michael, we're very friendly and helped foster a relaxed, fun atmosphere.
