Karen, thanks for the compliments! Michael and Chanjira truly love sharing the beauty of the Black Canyon with all their guests. We are thrilled they made your trip memorable!-Evolution Expeditions Team
We are so happy to hear you enjoyed your paddle down the mighty Colorado river! Thanks for leaving us a review.-Evolution Expeditions Team

My husband and I had a great time on this trip.  Our guides were Missy and Aaron. Both guides were just the right mix of pro, fun and smarts! The river and the cave and the whole experience was wonderful.  This trip is for anyone who needs a break from the hustle and bustle of The Strip. Pure air, amazing mountains, crystal clear water, exercise and FUN!!

Our guide was amazing. I recommend it for a great day out of the city.  Lunch sandwiches fresh from Jason’s deli can.t go wrong with them. I had a vegan veggie sandwich with pesto.  All u need to bring is what you need for sun and water smart protection. They provide the rest.  Simple!
Michael was a brilliant tour guide knowledgeable good fun and patient. Would recommend to anybody who fancies a day out in Vegas doing something different .
Thankful for Blade and Zander. We had a great experience on the water. They were professional, yet laid back for us to enjoy the day.

We appreciate the kind words. We are an incredible team that loves working together and making sure all of our guests have a wonderful experience. Jay and Ashley are incredible guides and we are thrilled to hear you enjoyed your time with them!-Evolution Expeditions Team
We agree the river truly is a beautiful place! It is such an excellent way to relax and let loose while still having fun.-Evolution Expeditions Team
We had a great time with Michael and Chanjira. The views were beautiful and it was a great experience. Lunch and snacks were provided and very yummy. The tour guides were very knowledgeable.
Amazing day with our wonderful guides Michael and Chanjira. It was absolutely beautiful and the lunch was very good

We had a great time. The area was beautiful. Michael and Chanjira were helpful and patient. Lunch was from Jason’s deli, and snacks were also provided. Their kayaks had rudders, which made it easier for us as first time kayakers. Definitely worth a trip.

Company was very organized - called us before the tour to let us know it was windy and suggest we switch to tandem kayaks (we did) and again the morning of the tour to check in. T-shirt, swim trunks, and flip flops were suitable for the weather (60 F and sunny when we set off) although was a little chilly before we warmed up from paddling. You will have to wade in the water to board your kayak. Our tour guide Shay was upbeat and positive and gave us useful tips for kayaking in the windy conditions. We originally wanted a self-guided tour but really glad we went with the tour because Shay knew the best spots, gave little talks about local history and plants, and provided snacks (granola bars, capri suns, water etc) for a great experience!
We are thrilled to hear you enjoyed your tour with Michael. Come see us again next time you are in Vegas!-Evolution Expeditions Team
Wow this is awesome yo hear! Our guides top priority is safety for EVERYONE on the river. We are so happy to hear Ashley rescued you from a dangerous situation! -Evolution Expeditions Team

We were 16 people which was really fun. Our tour guides were Shay and Xander. They were great - very friendly, knowledgeable and very helpful. The weather was crazy. We went through all the seasons - hot, cold, windy, rainy. But really beautiful. We did the half day tour with lunch. It was really good. I had the vegan sandwich with gluten free bread. I would highly recommend this tour. I’ve been wanting to do the full day so hopefully one day soon. You can’t go wrong with this company. I will definitely go with them again.
Ashley was the best tour guide. Great experience for families (we had a 10 yr old). Organized, high quality kayaks, on-time launch…couldn’t ask for a better experience. Highly recommend!!

Highly Recommend - If you’re looking for outstanding guides that are passionate, friendly, and knowledgeable about the area, this is the team. We had Skylar and Aaron and every time we passed another group on the river it was clear we were having more fun.

Our tour guide Ashley was great, the emerald cave was beautiful as were the views from the river!The history Ashley shared along the way was very informative and made for a memorable experience. This experience was physically demanding and arms will be sore tomorrow.

Ashley & Chanjira were amazing guides!!! My friend & I had a fantastic time with our group!! Kayaking Emerald Cave was our favorite thing we did on our trip to Vegas!! Thank you ladies for the wonderful memories!! (sorry this took so long to post)

Definitely the BEST tour around!!!!! Incredible people.  We took our time and enjoyed immense beauty.   We saw other tour groups race by- only to sit in one long line and wait to enter the cave- our guide kept us moving and was knowledgeable about the area and provided history, information on the rocks and plants, along with a little water gun battle😀.  I highly recommend this company and John and Blade for best guides!!!  Take cash and tip well😀

The equipment was high end and first-class all the way.  Aaron and Michael were awesome guides.  They shared local knowledge and made an exceptional trip even more enjoyable.  I highly recommend Evolution Expeditions and cannot wait to get back to Las Vegas to take the 7-hour trip!

Great kayaking trip with Michael and Aaron to the Emerald Cave! Knowledge guides who made the experience more fun (and bonus — we got to see some big horn sheep!). The trip is a nice relaxing paddle with some outstanding scenery (and i couldn’t believe how clear the water was!) — would definitely travel the river with them again!
Glad to hear Ashley and Blade showed you such a good time! The river truly does offer some spectacular views the entire time!-Evolution Expeditions Team
We had a great time,  would recommend it to anyone visiting Las Vegas. Felt good leaving the craziness of the city behind. Ash and Blade were awesome..

Charlie and Erin were excellent tour guides.  They were extremely helpful with getting the kayaks in and out of water.  They were very willing to answer questions and make the experience fun and interesting.  The kayaks are so much easier then many kayaks that we have used. The 3 hours was perfect!

We are stoked that you enjoyed your experience on the lower Colorado River! Sky and Jon definitely add a good dose of relaxation and appreciativeness to their tours. It's a fun vibe!-Team Evolution Expeditions
Great guides (Jay and Ashley) were well organized and knowledgeable about the area.  The equipment was excellent and lunch was delicious.

Thank you! We try to add on folks as quickly as possible when they want to paddle with us, even on the same day sometimes. We are glad it worked out, and you enjoyed your day in the Black Canyon.-Team Evolution Expeditions

Awesome respite from the fun but exhausting eating and drinking of the standard trip to Vegas (i.e. the Strip).  TL;DR Definitely do it if you're thinking about it, it was the highlight of our entire trip.It's about a 60 min drive out to the starting point (Willow Beach, AZ) which is kind of cool in itself as you get to get outside of Vegas proper and see some of the surrounding lands.  Kayaking is 2 miles up to the cove and then 2 miles back.  We did it with a solid (but not deathly) hangover and made it just fine.  (The fresh air and physical activity certainly helps!)  The cove itself is a pretty but small little nook on the side of the river, however the entire river is surrounded by dramatic cliffs and is beautiful.Our guides, Jalen and Xander, were super friendly and knowledgable.  It was my wife's first time kayaking (and a couple of other people's from the look of it) and they were patient and helpful in herding us cats.  Kayaking gear was of high quality and in great shape.It was an excellent experience and I can highly recommend it.

This was my second time paddling with the evolution expedition group and it was just as amazing as the first. Charlie was our guide this time and was super knowledgeable and friendly. Thanks so much! Can’t wait for the next visit!
We appreciate your recommendation and are elated that you enjoyed your adventure with us!-Team Evolution Expeditions
We are glad to hear that you had a great time on the river with Jalen. Each of our guides gives their tours a unique spin. See you next time!-Team Evolution Expeditions
Our guide was Ashley, she is super nice and friendly. She was very personable. The views of everything was absolutely stunning.
Thank you for your recommendation! The Lake Mead NRA is definitely worth checking out, whether with a different outfitter (hopefully not 🙄) or us. See you next time!-Team Evolution Expeditions
Kayaking is a great event for a bachelorette party with plenty of fun to be had! We are stoked that you enjoyed your experience with us!-Team Evolution Expeditions
It's great to hear that the weather cooperated, sometimes there are some spotty days during the winter season. Thank you for your recommendation!-Team Evolution Expeditions
Tour guide was excellent, super knowledgeable of the local area and history. Very nice young lady and was super helpful to everyone.

Hi Hi, we are sorry to hear that you didn't receive the expected experience. Unfortunately, the weather is one of the few factors we cannot control. Please reach out to us to track down those photos for you.-Debbie D. Team Evolution Expeditions
We appreciate you leaving us a review. We focus on creating a top-notch customer experience from beginning to end. Thank you for noticing our efforts!-Team Evolution Expeditions

Aaron and Skyler were incredible tour guides. Aaron knew so much about the history of the river and was incredibly helpful, personable, and kind. He accommodated a large group of kayakers with diverse abilities and interests - he really made the tour incredible. The river was absolutely beautiful and the kayaks were incredibly high quality. The tour couldn't have been better.
Thank you for choosing to paddle with us on V-day! We hope you enjoyed your experience enough to revisit us someday.-Team Evolution Expeditions
I have to say that the entire trip was an excellent experience from pick up at the hotel, the kayak trip itself (Zander was awesome!!) and then drop off back at the hotel.

Awesome! Thank you for choosing to paddle with us on your grandson's special day. We try to streamline the whole experience our guests have, from booking to drop-offs, and we appreciate your review.-Team Evolution Expeditions
This was probably one of the best trips I ever had in a while and had one of the best tour guides!!!

Las Vegas doesn't advertise outdoor adventures. My group found out about this at 2am the night. We called and left a message. 9am the next day Marney gives me a call. Marney was extremely helpful getting a group of 9 people together on the water by 11am. We were then picked up by Chris who was very friendly, professional, and knowledgeable who drove us to the Marina. He even took us to see some mountain goats on the way back. Lastly, our guide Ashley was a blast. Chris even tagged along due to we had some 1st time paddlers. Ashley was very knowledgeable on the history of the area and was very patient with our 1st time paddlers. This trip was amazing and was better than anything on the Strip. Absolutely had the best time on this adventure. Get off the beaten path and enjoy some of the most amazing,  best kept secret views that Vegas has to offer!

Highly recommend joining these awesome guys on a trip of a life time! Shout out to our tour guys Ashley and Chris! Ashley and Chris are fun and out going also very knowledgeable! Please give these wonderful people a try you won't regret it! Side note: Chris was also our transportation driver and at the end of the day he offered to take us to see a cool scenery with goats! Thank you Chris and Ashley y'all are the best!

The Kayak tour with Chris and Ashley was amazing, so im giving them 5 stars!! They were so patient and informative to us. This tour was the best experience we have had in Las Vegas, and we will diffiantly be back. They go above and beyond to accommodate, and we really appreciated it. Shout out to Marnie for making this last minute reservation possible! Best experience ever!

Thank you for the awesome review!  We love to share the beauty of the Black Canyon and Colorado River to our guests. Come see us next time you're out this way.-Ashley and the Evolution Expeditions Team
It was cool seeing big horn sheep, bridge on the side of the mountain, awesome clear river and, of course,the emerald cave! Jaden was an awesome guide!

We booked this tour for my fiance's birthday, we were a group of four and our guide Ashley was awesome! She was super prepared with sunscreen, snacks, towels and she was very informative on the history and wildlife. We had a great day and we will definitely do it again soon! Highly recommend this tour for anyone who enjoys the outdoors! Also, you don't need to be experienced, Ashley gave us great instructions and we got comfortable in the kayaks in no time!

This was my favorite part of our trip. I had never kayaked before, and fell in love with it. The river is crystal clear because of the filtration that occurs further up river (if I recall correctly, it gets filtered at the Hoover Dam). I think this experience spoiled me though because not all rivers are this clean and not all this scenic. We did this tour in September so it was warm outside, but the river was cool. It felt great to get in the water when we stopped for lunch and during a break a long the way.

This was the most amazing awesome experience ever! The tour guide picked us up on the strip and had a great fun personality! Once we arrived all the staff were super kind and helpful as we all figured out what we were doing as this was my 1st ever kayaking experience. We had a group of 9 and 2 awesome tour guides! The journey was perfectly timed to enjoy the breathtaking beauty! Pictures do not even come close to what we saw. We enjoyed a great tasting fresh lunch on the beach with a little side hike and then traveled on. We we’re not rushed at all and the guides took time to tell us amazing stories from our surroundings. They also took fantastic pictures of all of us! This is definitely a MUST do attraction when visiting Las Vegas!!! I will definitely do it again because it was an absolutely priceless experience!!!
The whole story of the place seemed very interesting to us, nature and landscape. The guides kept the day nice, interesting and safe. We are gonna recommend this for sure.

This was an amazing experience and one you need to add to and then check off your bucket list. From sending a message on FB to being offered extra water before we headed back, we got white glove service by every employee. They were able to not only accommodate but fully cater to my allergies for lunch (down to the gluten free cookie!) I guarantee that everyone on the tour also had a great time too so just go book your ticket already and see for yourself!

Evolution Expeditions was simply exceptional from start to finish.  Ashley was our guide and she could not have been better. She has amazing skills that gave us confidence and made the trip unforgettable. She has incredible knowledge about the area and fascinating stories. She really made our trip!!! The best day ever. Would highly recommend this company. Daniel and Ross
Me and my boyfriend loved every minute of this experience. The water was very cold but it was very hot out so it was a good combo. The guide was knowledgeable and fun. So much fun!!!

Thank you for your recommendation! Our kayaking tours are full of opportunities to have some fun in the sun. It's great to hear that you had an awesome time on the Colorado River!Evolution Expeditions

Phenomenal experience.  (Went 12/1/2021) Perfect weather!  Beautiful views.  And request Xander...he rocked.  (Make sure he brings the flute!).  Top notch outfit.  Well run.  Low impact and super chill.  Can't wait to do it again!!  The photos don't do it justice.  More beautiful in person!

1st excursion since covid. Felt safe. People wore masks when near other groups/inside van. Ended up going on cloudy day so wasn’t as emerald green as it could have been. Lots of different groups on water so we had to wait our turn but worth the wait. Great staff & overall experience.

The kids and I had a great time on this kayak trip. Ashley was a great guide - very informative and patient. The water was cold this time of year, but it was an easy paddle and the views were amazing. Highly recommend you do this tour (or a longer one if you are experienced and can paddle further). The drive from Vegas was less than an hour. While technically the Colorado River, it is dammed up in this area to create a lake, so there are no real river currents to fight. If you're traveling with kids or just looking to escape the casinos, this is a good choice!

Incredible trip. Spent amazing time with family and had an absolute blast kayaking and hiking. Jon, our guide, was very knowledgeable about the dam, the surrounding area, native birds and creatures, and he took the time to engage with every single person to make sure they were having a great time. He slowed down for my 13 yr old niece and she couldn't have had more fun. Awesome views, fun hikes, not too strenuous with plenty of breaks. Guide was prepared with anything and everything. Wonderful company, wonderful trip. Highly recommended.

Had such a great time on the first annual “Turkey Paddle!” Our guide Jon made kayaking 12 miles down the Colorado river an enjoyable experience. The planned stops, short hikes, and our guides knowledge of the area made it a perfect family outing for us. Lots of smiles the entire day😀!
It was great,had a awesome time on the lake. Our guide was very helpful and took care of us even when the wind picked up

Nice trip, guides Ashley and John were great. Only bummer was the 45 minute wait to enter the cave. There was a long line of other kayak tours. By the time we were up the sun had moved on so we didn't get the full experience. It wasn't anything the guides could have prevented, just a short window of sunlight opportunity this time of year.
Since our tours are designed for guests of all ages and activity levels, it is great for children and their parents. We see it as an introduction tour for youngsters to get involved in the outdoors.
This trip was amazing!  The guides were the best ever. Cannot say enough good things about the entire experience!
Great paddle on the river with exceptional guides. They knew everything and also had a lot of fun with our group of friends.  Thanks for a great day on the river.
It was a great experience and the sense of safety and the knowledge of the tour guide around the place was awesome . Keep up the good job .

I had myself a great time. Meeting time was on point, the group size was perfect and the equipment although not new, was high grade stuff. Of course the tour guide was the bomb.com and was very conversational as well as laid back to make your experience easy and relaxing as I was expecting it to be as a first timer. I definitely recommend reserving your tour with this outfit as they are good to go!

Don't waste your time or money.  The only part of the trip that was enjoyable was the man-made hot springs.  The water was running hot, but he used sand-bags to pool it so you could step or sit in.  We were contacted the day prior and told the winds would be high, but not high enough that they would cancel it - BUT IF WE WANTED TO CANCEL, THEY COULD NOT REFUND SOME COSTS.  Yet if they cancelled, they would have to refund it all.  So they kept pressing us to cancel, which we didn't do so that we wouldn't lose money.  We had received several notices that we had to be there by a specific time as we had to go through Hoover Dam security.  A group from Texas showed up over 1/2 late, which made everyone have to listed to the entire safety lesson again, and take time to get them fitted, yet they didn't even apologize.  Once we got to the landing to put in, that group didn't even help carry kayaks, yet we were all asked to since we were so late (again, Texas fault).  After the first few miles, the winds were so strong that you would go backwards if you didn't paddle constantly - so this was not even enjoyable.The Emerald Cave was a joke.  They had all 8 of the kayaks get in this little space at one time.  There was no amazing view.  The guides even laughed about what a joke it was.  When asked about the high winds, the guides said it was like that all the time.So don't waste your money on this one.  I would give negative stars if I could.

I loved this tour. It’s a really fun adventure to have and a break from the Vegas strip. The views are amazing. It was my first time on a kayak and was not hard at all. My sister did have trouble because she was by herself but she has one-on-one help and got the hang of it. The guide were amazing, so helpful and full of knowledge. Snacks and lunch were good too not wack at all. Plenty of water. It’s a must do.
The whole trip was amazing informative and beautiful surroundings . Our guide stopped along the way and gave us a history on different parts of the trail
The trip was amazing and our guide did an outstanding and professional job - she educated us both about the kayak and the surrounding area - we would do it again in a minute!

We recently did a tour with Ashely and John from Evolution - this was our favorite activity during vacation!  The entire excursion exceeded expectations, knowledgeable guides, perfect pace, great snacks, etc.  I would definitely book another trip with Evolution and would HIGHLY recommend them an their guides.
Emerald Cave tour and history talk about volcanoes  and Hoover Dam. Ashley and Jonathan have mastery of the tour

We did 4 hour trip from the marina to Emerald Cave with Jalen and Charlie who exceeded our expectations with their knowledge of the area, and because they are genuinely, authentic and gracious guides. We give them six stars!! We absolutely love the kayak with the rudder as this was the first time we had experience this kind of kayak. It is so easy to maneuver with a rudder. Even the seats were comfortable and there was plenty of storage for the things you might have brought. We did wish that we had a dry bag for our stuff, but they did provide quart-sized bags for phones or small items and there was storage on the front and bag of the kayak. All the equipment was well maintained (i.e., life jackets, kayaks, paddles). Now on to the adventure. The water of Lake Mead was cool (about 58 degrees).  The canyon walls were volcanic in origin and along the way you could see evidence of  faulting.  We learned that the Razorback Sucker is endemic to the Colorado River and there is a hatchery that assist with stocking the lake. Along the way we stopped and did a short hike up to a place where people used to gauge the water level and quality during the Hover Dam Construction. We did wish we had worn river sandals instead of swim shoes for that little hike. But, it was totally doable anyway.We visited the Emerald Cave with emerald green water. The view from inside the cave to outside to the river stunning. We say that the “cave” is really a “cove” but all the same was worth the visit. We had a great lunch catered by Jason’s Deli and nice snacks along the way.

We had a great day.  All of the communication was timely and professional.  They were right where they said they would be.  Lunch was tasty. Our guide Charlie was knowledgeable.   Overall - a great day.
good staff that knows their stuff. quality kayaks and equipment. it does not take a lot of stamina to do the physical activity. The guides are knowledgable about the geology of the river.

Forgot our guides name, but she was awesome.  The trip there and back in the van was very entertaining and history info. The tour itself was awesome.  Will do it again and recommend to everyone who visits.  Food and snacks provided were great even though we brought our own. It wasn’t some homemade sandwich,  it was a local bistro place that makes them for this event.  The caves were incredible.
Had such a great experience, the guides were so friendly and very informational to all of us. Would definitely consider it again when I come back to visit.

From the moment we booked online to the time we got dropped back at the hotel, we had a great experience. Marnies customer service in getting us booked was great. Charlie picked us up and shuttled us back and was great to chat with. Our guide Ashley was amazing! She was knowledgeable, funny and great at keeping the group engaged. Already looking forward to our next experience!!

This was a fantastic getaway from Las Vegas - the drive out was beautiful (including the stop at the Hoover Dam bridge overlook and trail) and the tour on the river was stunning with the clear water and dramatic canyon walls. Jalen and John were great guides-good with both experienced and non-experienced kayakers with safety first at the top of their list. The additional historical and ecological knowledge and information they shared about the water, fishing, plants and other wildlife plus a lot of info about the Hoover Dam was fascinating. I am so glad I participated on this tour!

Jalen was the perfect guide. He knew a lot about the environment and history of the area. The trip was the perfect length, weather was great, and the views were amazing. Jalen provided awesome snacks and lunch too!

It always amazes me how much natural beauty and outdoor activities are available when in Vegas. This tour was top notch. Our p/u driver, kayak guide and narrator was Charlie-our total gal Friday. She did it all and was wonderful at every phase. The equipment was also top rate. The 4 hour tour was the perfect length-and the towering contains of the Colorado were spectacular. Honestly the cave itself was just so-so, but that don’t take away from the tour a bit really. It was the daytime highlight of our week in Vegas. Should also mention Marnie was a delight to t/w re scheduling-we had to move our day a couple times and she couldn’t have been more helpful. A definite must do

This kayak adventure was amazing!!  The company was easy to work with and the person who did our reservations and the guides were all professional, helpful, and kind.  They provided us with the best kayaks that worked for us and our kids to ensure we had the most enjoyable experience.  The water is beautiful and the food was good.  We would definitely go again and we would definitely use this tour group any time, any place!
Great Tour Guides along the river that provided interesting facts about the river.  Will definitely do the kayak tour again when I am on that side of the country again.

The guides were fabulous! The views were beautiful. We loved the hot springs and lunch was delicious. Highly recommend this trip, it was worth every penny! It was my teen's favorite day of our vacation.

Our tour guide was really cool and helpful throughout the whole tour. We would definitely book another kayak tour. We highly recommend it, it’s perfect for a fun and memorable family vacation activity.

We appreciate you taking the time to leave us a review. Our guides handle guests of ALL ranges of kayaking experience so patience is a must on the river. Our goal is for all of our guests to have a wonderful time while on tour.

Everything from the hotel pick up, to travelling to the kayak launch, the explanation of the tour and operation of the kayaks was amazing.  Aaron was our guide and was informative, pleasant and made us feel comfortable especially because we had one person that had never kayaked.  He took the time to talk about the local history, plants and rocks on the trail. Would recommend this tour and Aaron as your guide.  We will definitely be back for another trip.

Awesome! We are glad that you enjoyed your day on the Colorado River. On top of taking in the sights and information about the area, we try to teach our guests proper paddling skills to use later on in life, hopefully. Our goal is to make all 1st-time paddlers pros that want to continue kayaking in the future!

Charlie was such a fun guide. She made sure we had everything we needed. She was so perceptive, asked us where we wanted to go, what we wanted to see, made sure we had plenty of water, snacks, sunscreen, etc… The tour was fantastic! I’m so glad we went with this company. Other tours had 12 or more people and the larger crowds definitely had more waiting times to get into the attractions such as the hot springs. We only had 4 kayaks, including our guide and it was perfect. These guys also hustled to get us in the water and launched 1st thing and it was worth it. We had first access to all the best spots and the best pictures because we were ahead of everyone. 10 out 10 I can’t wait to go back and do this again.
One of the best experiences of my life. The sauna cave is a must see! Our guide Charlie was phenomenal. Cannot recommend enough!!

Kayak Hiking and Hot Springs was amazing. My guide Ashley Miller took excellent care of me. She walked with me, encouraged me, and I don’t know if I would have made the challenge without her. Her disposition was so giving and she had exceptional knowledge of the hike. She was so giving and nurturing. Ashley Miller deserves a raise. While Sebastian and Aaron were with the other group, they too had a wonderful spirit and they cared about the entire group as a whole.

We had a great kayaking experience on the Colorado river. We did it in july, so it was super hot, but our guides had planned some water guns for us! Awesome. Lunch was really yummy and plentiful.Super experience.
Esther and Charlie certainly are full of fun facts. We are delighted that your group had a fun time on the river! Thank you for paddling with us!
Ester and Charlie were amazing tour guides.  Knowledgeable and fun! So glad we took this tour.  I highly recommend this tour.
Great day on the water. Our guides Esther and Charlie were awesome and knew their stuff. Would definitely do it again.
YAY! We are thrilled that you had such a wonderful time with Ashley exploring the Lower Colorado River. She gives a sense of security when guests are with her, for that we love her!
Thank you for leaving us a review. Charlie and Esther are an awesome team and give their guests a top-notch experience full of knowledge and tons of fun!

Awesome experience! Esther & Charlie were so helpful, informative, and generally lovely. Totally worth it. I should have worn other shoes & brought flip flops to change into afterwards though! That’s my bad. This was a fun, affordable adventure that was easy to book too. 10/10
It was just what I needed, a nice relaxing kayak trip. Jon and Charlie were very knowledgeable about everything we asked them and a lot of fun. THANKS
The Hot Springs hikes serve as a great way to break up the day and allow our guests to see more than just the river. We are delighted that you had a fabulous time with Ash and Xander!

This was my first time kayaking and I had such a wonderful time! The scenery was gorgeous and our guide, Jalen, made the whole experience super fun and enjoyable. He is extremely knowledgeable about the area and gave us great information about the history and science behind this area. I was worried about how physically challenging it would be for me as a beginner but it wasn’t too hard. We went in October and got lucky with the sun shining so even though we got wet paddling, we never got cold. I loved it!
This was my second trip with this touring company down the Colorado River. The guides are awesome and the scenery is amazing. I highly recommend it!

A MUST EXPERIENCE! As a road tripper and explorer I always look for unique activities for a well rounded adventure. Ashley and Esther were phenomenal guides. They both had delightful positive energy and were knowledgeable about the area we were kayaking. I also appreciated the thorough instructions on how to kayak and their safety protocols. I highly recommend this adventure!
Ashley, and Esther were amazing! Super fun and friendly both extremely knowledgeable! It was a great time on and off the water!

Thank you for taking the time to recommend our adventure! Esther and Ashley try to balance sharing their knowledge of the area with having fun on and off the river. Thant way, it is a well-rounded and fun experience for all.
These gals have a way of making guests feel safe and comfortable in an environment that you may not be familiar with. We agree that Esther and Ash are excellent at their jobs!
Our guides pride themselves in the knowledge they have of the park's flora and fauna. Thank you for noticing this, and thank you for your review.
Our Fall weather is AMAZING! Especially for folks visiting from those states with cooler weather. Our park truly offers breathtaking views year-round.
So beautiful!! Esther and Ashley were awesome guides and were very informative about the land and history!
If it were up to us, we would've fixed the road years ago, haha. Thank you for paddling with us, and we are glad that you enjoyed your day on the river with Ashley and Esther.

What a fun and exciting adventure! I am a first time Kayaker and Esther and her team were the best leaders! We were picked up in Vegas and driven to Willow Beach, Arizona and kayaked on the Colorado River to the Emerald Cave. The adventure was great and all 6 of my friends enjoyed themselves as well.  I felt safe and learned to operate the kayak and navigate the waters. Thank you Evolutions Expeditions!
I planned this trip for my 50th Birthday and had a few friends with me.  And it was the best birthday ever for me!!  The staff was so great and fun!!
The tour guides were very nice. We saw amazing views. I will definitely be back again. This was the best kayaking trip ever.
We truly appreciate your recommendation. Safety is a top priority for Evolution Expeditions but is followed closely by our guides sharing their knowledge and passion for the outdoors and kayaking.

We genuinely value your recommendation! At EEK, we want our guests to leave with enough knowledge about kayaking and the area to share it with others to help create stoke about the outdoors and our beautiful park. Thank you.

This was my first time kayaking and it was amazing. I first got in and was panicking and our guide Jalen came and saved the day. He calmed me down and helped me the whole way through when i wanted to stop he made me push forward and it was amazing. Would highly recommend this company and him personally as a guide. Also when our tire popped we gave them a call and they drove back 20 minutes to give us a ride back towards the strip. Highly appreciate them for their service. Thank you!
The stop at the river gauger ruins, and the beautiful water. Our guides Charlie and John were terrific.

Thank you for your recommendation. As a company one of our top priorities is sharing our knowledge of the area, flora, and fauna with our guests in hopes that our enthusiasm for the outdoors lifestyle is contagious enough to inspire others to follow in our steps.

My wife and I booked our kayaking expedition with Evolution to help celebrate our grandson's 10th Birthday. We had an awesome time. From check-in to check-out, we had no issues what so ever. Out guide "Zander" was outstanding. He even gave us a small performance with a traditional native flute, while we were inside the mouth of the cave. The weather was perfect and it will be hard pressed to find another kayaking event.

We 100% agree that Jalen gives off "good vibes". He is patient with guests that aren't as experienced and is able to keep the group in sync regardless of if they are a novice or advanced paddlers. Thank you for choosing EEK!

This is a great company to book this tour with. They are very professional, organized and they make it fun. Xander was the BEST tour guide. He is kind and friendly. He definitely  knows what he’s doing. We would recommend this activity to everyone! 🚣
I can say the tour was Amazing! We went with a group of 8 and we had so much fun. It was a spectacular tour and the views and stop were Excellent.
Ashley/ Jon were awesome ! What a great , well worth the $$$ ! Will sign up again , next year ! And will bring friends !

This was such a beautiful experience. The tour guides were funny and knowledgeable of the area. I surprised my husband for his 30th birthday with this tour and the group sang Happy Birthday while we were all in the cave. The guides took photos for us, fed us snacks and drinks, and we enjoyed the facts and conversation along the way.Emerald Cave is gorgeous, smaller than I had imagined, but still lovely. The route to the cave was breathtaking! We will come back for sure.

This was my first time kayak for this long. It was fun going with a group of friends. I like the two guides we had. They were nice and friendly. I wouldn’t do it again in the summertime. It was hot and some of us got sunburned. Honestly, the scenery isn’t much to see but I’m glad I did it.
The guides were friendly, engaging and did a good job keeping the group together. I would definitely use them again.
The weather, the kayaking, the beautiful nature, the cool cave and our great guide made this one of the best things in our vacation that everyone absolutely loved!!!
Charlie was a very kind guide and very professional. We look forward to returning some day. Hopefully Charlie will still be with you folks.

I really enjoyed this venture. My boyfriend and I were celebrating out 30th birthday alone with our closet family and friends. My boyfriend was the only one that had been kayaking before. Everyone one else was very excited and scared at the same time. Our instructors were very patient and nice. Once everyone were over their fears we had a really great time.

I've done the Emerald Cave tour twice now and it was thoroughly enjoyable both times! My second time doing the tour, I actually booked the Lake Mead tour, but a last minute storm rolled in and we had to cancel the tour. Evolution Expedition worked with our group completely! Some members opted for a full refund, while a couple of us decided to reschedule with their Emerald Cave tour for the next day. I've experience this tour with 3 different guides and they were all fun, informative, and made you feel completely safe! Evolution Expedition will continue to keep my business with their wonderful staff and awesome tour options!

We had the best time! I was dealing with the Vegas flu and Anthony saved my life 🤦🏼‍♀️ Packed snacks, kept me hydrated and even helped pull me back when I just couldn’t do anymore. 10/10 recommend NOT going out the night before this trip, but 10/10 recommend doing this!! I’ve never seen anything so beautiful.

Ashley and Aaron were terrific. They set a comfortable pace, we’re knowledgeable and very friendly. The tour maybe shouldn’t be called a cave tour as the cave is the least impressive part of the tour. The views from the channel of the mountains were spectacular. Awesome day! Thank you!

Our tour guide, Charlie, was excellent, super chill, and knew a lot about the area and its history.  The scenery is simply stunning and in early October, not too hot. Spouse and I had never kayaked before and we found Charlie's instructions easy to follow. The kayaks were easy to maneuver.  Well worth the price we paid, which included pick up and drop off at the strip.  Don't forget sunscreen and a small backpack will fit inside the waterproof section on the kayak. Tour provided plenty of water, snacks, and lunch. Emerald Cave is smaller than the pics look, but Charlie took her time guiding us in and allowed us to spend a few minutes there while she gave additional info about the Cave. The trip was short enough not to tucker us out for the day, but long enough to thoroughly enjoy ourselves. We highly recommend and will come again next year.  Ask for Charlie!
Aaron was a great tour guide. Highly recommend this fun tour. Such a nice and scenic tour away from the hustle of Las Vegas
As you said, unfortunately at times the line for Emerald Cave can get a little long so it is nice to give the option to skip and see other amazing sights. Cheers!
Great trip! Beautiful place! Wonderful experience! The tour guide Jaylen is great! He is very professional and thoughtful, caring! Really had great time!

Had a great trip. Beautiful area. Xander was awesome. The water is unreal, crystal clear and emerald green. Just like the pictures. You have to hit the cove at the right time to get the same effect, but you can get a similar effect on the river.

Jaylen, our tour guide was top notched….he took his time with our party…and was very personable..Evan though the weather started off raining he got us through it and by mid way through the sun came out

Our tour guide Ashley was fantastic! Wow, I totally love her professionalism, her optimism, and her wisdom. Her spirit and positive energy was worth every bit of the cost. I was especially impressed by her calm demeanor when a guy who could not swim capsized near the shore and she rescued him without a hitch. Well-trained and super prepared. Thanks for the snacks too. Please invite me to your family events Ashley. Dr Erica and Dr Monds consider you our little sister. Many blessings and Godspeed on your life journey. Expedition Travel is blessed to have you.
Aaron was an awesome guide. He brought us to some beautiful springs and falls. He was great with everyone in our group. A+
Jalen was our guide on the tour both him and the experience were awesome and I highly recommend it. 10/10 recommended for friends, family, or a group.

The company and guides for our trip were amazing, we couldn't have asked for better hosts. It was a super crowded Sunday (multiple kayaking companies all leaving the same spot and heading to the same point of interest), we waited at emerald cave (30+ minutes) to see the "cave" and it was an in and out 5 min stop. We enjoy kayaking so it was nice to be on the water however the cave experience felt rushed and then it was a sprint back to shore as everyone was exhausted.
The whole trip was wonderful! Our guide Jalen was fantastic! Really recommend you fo this while here!

The short hikes up to the hot springs were nice. Our guides, Ashley and Sebastian were great. Really nice, energetic, knowledgeable and made sure everyone was safe and enjoying themselves. The trip was also really organized and well run.

The weather was perfect and the water was cold.  Our guides were fun and helpful.  We were not rushed so our paddle down the river to Emerald Cave was leisurely with stops to snack and look at wildlife.  My only tip is for those who burn easily -- inner thighs and knees are exposed so wear long shorts or capris!  Thanks EE for a great day.  It couldn't have been any better!!
Thorough instructions, Interacted with all our group. Lead and sweep guidance for the whole group. Good Snacks.

We had a great trip with our instructor, Jalen. He was patient with us as we weren't the best kayakers in the water. He kept a good pace. Shared his knowledge of the desert, the landscape, the animals and the waters. And was very friendly to me, my 12 year old and the other kayakers on the tour.
Thank you for paddling with us. We really enjoy getting folks away from the hustle and bustle of the city to explore the river and desert. We had an awesome day. -Seba & Ash

We genuinely appreciate your recommendation. We love having first-time paddlers as guests, not only to show them the river but also to teach them to paddle correctly and hopefully want to continue to kayak in the future.

i was really scared at first when my boyfriend signed us up for kayaking. however after meeting esther and charlie my nerves were a little eased. I was expecting to ride with someone experienced and by all means my boyfriend is handy but not with this experience lol. after the help of esther we learned great communication and team work in a matter of minutes being in the middle of the river. esther and charlie were great your guides. charlie was a great helping hand when i was loosing it and afraid of tipping over. they showed a ton of beautiful scenery and gave some history. esther was a ball full of energy and i would recommend it to any first timers afraid like i was. ask for the dynamic duo….esther and charlie.
This is our second time and we loved it!! Such a great option for outdoor time in Vegas. Can’t wait to try the other tours.
Esther & Charlie were incredible, we had an amazing time and couldn’t have asked for a better day trip!
We are stoked that you were able to make it out with us and that you enjoyed your day with your guides. Esther and Charlie are two of the best on the river. Come visit us again soon! Cheers.

Jalen was very patient and knowledgeable.  He made the experience not so stressful for newcomers and I felt very safe.  The history shared along the way made Las Vegas more than casinos. The trip was peaceful and fun. He accommodated all skill levels. Lunch was delicious and the spots we stopped were interesting as well.
We apologize that you felt rushed, some days DO get hectic on the river and the cave is always busy but we try to manage the best we can. Next time you come back remind us to get some dope pictures!
Charlie and Ester made this trip so fun and interesting. Highly recommend. The views were amazing. Will definitely go again
This trip was so worth getting up early in the morning for!! The sauna cave, hot springs- all so much fun.  Jon was a great guide and super knowledgeable!

Everything was great, and our guides, Esther and Charlie, were the best! They’re so friendly, helpful and knowledgeable, and several of us were novice paddlers! Don’t miss the opportunity to explore the beautiful Colorado River with a great kayaking company!
Jalen was a great tour guide. He did a great job with providing education to the group regarding the canyon and the cave and other sights surrounding.

Our guide Jalen was awesome!  He was very knowledgeable and patient with our group.   I would highly recommend this tour.  We completed the short expedition, a 4 mile out and back which was a perfect  distance that still leaves you time to enjoy other sites while your in the Hoover Dam Area.

This was a great trip. Aaron was a fun, knowledgeable guide who tailored our trip perfectly for our group.  He was attentive and funny. We went for an amazing short hike, swam in the river and went inside the emerald cave to see the crystal clear water.   We had a nice small group.  The packed lunch was A+.  The kayaks were excellent as well.

Esther and Ashley were amazing tour guides! Delicious lunch. Beautiful scenery. Breathtaking views! We kayaked through two states. The Emerald Cave was pretty. You back in your kayaks to get a picture. Plenty of snacks and water were provided. Awesome adventure that exceeded our expectations!!
The tour guide was excellent and very informative though out the tour as to where we were. The landscape is nice

Aaron was a G. Hosted well, knowledgeable, and very friendly. We not only got concise info on operating and kayaking, but a history lesson from him along the way to boot. It just made the whole experience much more real. Thanks again for saving my ass when I flipped, dude. Hahaha would definitely do again. Be prepared for a workout.
a highly informative,immersive tour Jalen really knew his stuff and gave an organic experience 10/10
The water and the views were spectacular.. our guide Charlie was awesome !!  She was very informative on the history

It was amazing! They were very helpful with me and my friend being beginners. We never been kayaking before this trip. They gave us snacks and drinks during our tour. Showed us some great views including blue and green waters. We got to go in the cave which was amazing. I also learned a lot . I would definitely do it all over again.

Ashley and Zander were wonderful tour guides! Very informative, safety conscience, family oriented with no offensive language and just really sweet young people! And we enjoyed the melody that Zander played in the cave! So glad we chose Evolutions Expeditions! HEY to Ashley and Zander!

Was amazzzzing our guides made the trip Esther and Jalen were top notch.  Very educated on the land and great sense of humor! I recommend this tour highly! And the lunch was pretty damn good if I say so myself!

Tons of fun! A group of us took a guided tour to see the caves. Being from Michigan the idea of  kayaking in the desert seems crazy 🌵 but it was so beautiful. We learned about how they scouted the canyon way back in day for the Hoover Dam, and saw eagles and big horn rams.

Three of us decided to do this and boy am I glad we did! Aaron was our guide and he was excellent! Very knowledgeable and personable. So much fun on the river! It was somewhat strenuous but very doable for 3 hours. Both my husband and I are 60 and our friend who went with us is 63! We would go again! Did I mention Aaron was fabulous oh yea I did!
Safety is our TOP priority here at EEK, especially on days with higher levels of winds. We cannot control the weather but we can make sure our guests stay safe and have a great time out there.

I went with my girlfriend and we had such a great time. The guides were very helpful. We are very much novices when it comes to kayaking but got the hang of it pretty quickly. The water/scenery is gorgeous. Perfect for an outdoor activity with your significant other!
Thanks for your recommendation. Now that your first time was a success you'll have to come back for another adventure!
This were our first time on a kayak and we enjoyed it.  The guide was nice and the lunch hit the spot. We would do another tour again.
Thank you for leaving a review. Sunscreen, water, and snacks are a must, especially in the summertime! Our guides should provide these items but it is never a bad idea to bring your own.

This was by far one of the best experiences I've ever had.  The views were amazing and the company was excellent.  Our guide Charli was superb and I enjoyed every minute talking with her about the area.  She was very knowledgeable and more fun than I could have imagined. I HIGHLY recommend this excursion for everyone! I can't wait to go back!

Awesome!!! This tour is great!! The tour guides are amazing...cant remember all the names..but Aaron.They were all very helpful and great people!!  First time kayaking and was great!! Will come back again for sure
My husband and I kayaked to the Emerald Cave, our guides were Michelle and Charlie, both very amazing!  It really is a beautiful spot.

We had an excellent time as a family on our kayak adventure.  Our guides were awesome and very professional.  The trip was the perfect length of time based on our youngest being 12 and oldest 65!  Would highly recommend!
We had a great time enjoying the beautiful scenery.  The cool water activity was a great change of pace from hiking. Our guide was engaging and knowledgeable. The Emerald color is unbelievable!
Ray and John were excellent guides. They were fun and informative. I wish we had time to stop on shore and swim or walk around but regardless, the tour was wonderful and we highly recommend it.
we went as a family and had such a good time.  these are memories that we will all remember.  get out of vegas and enjoy something unique

My husband and I took the emerald canyon kayak trip having never been on a kayak! We were really worried about not knowing the basics and being exhausted and unable to make it. However, the staff was great at explaining how to navigate a kayak and were really good at keeping us together. We also had enough brakes to were we weren't exhausted until the very very end!

Would highly recommend! Great guide that was friendly and knowledgeable. We rented a car and drove from the Vegas strip and it was a great drive there. Kayaking up the river was amazing. Very affordable for the experience you get. Lot of photo opportunities and neat to see the water and canyon walls change as the sun got higher in the sky. Refreshing swim after lunch on a beach we pulled up to hit the spot too.
This was a great excursion for our large group.  They were so accommodating to keep our group together.  Very beautiful scenery!  Just breathtaking.  I strongly recommend.
We are very lucky to have Esther she is an amazing tour guide.  Thank you for spending time with us on the river and we really appreciate the kind review.

We enjoyed our kayaking adventure!  The tour guide provided us with history of the Colorado River and Hoover Dam while we kayaked to Emerald Cove. We also enjoyed the opportunity to get into the cove!  We stopped along the way for a short hike. We were offered plenty of opportunities to take picture and they supplied a water and snacks. We plan on doing the 8 hour kayaking tour next time we are in Vegas!  Highly recommend!!

Charlie and Aaron were our tour guides from Evolution Expeditions on this amazing adventure, and this was THE BEST trip my family and I could’ve asked for!  This trip could be difficult in a solo kayak if you don’t have a lot of upper body strength and also if the wind is really kicking that day.  I am unable to do a successful push-up, but I am a very active and severely determined person, and it was a little difficult because the first 6ish miles were fine and leisurely, but the last 6ish were a real workout with the wind through there, if that helps at all gaging whether you should be in a solo or duo kayak. One of the best decisions made!!!  So blessed to have done this!!!!

We did the long excursion. the minute we sat in the kayaks I knew.. I would be going back. You will not regret it. The only downfall was we expected to be able to relax i. the hot springs for 15-20 minutes and that wasn't the case and that rowing... seems endless lol. But beautiful 100% recommended
Excellent in every way. Great trip, great cave, great tour company,  great guides. Must see at least once and this company makes the trip worth it.
A must do activity in the emerald cave. It's very scenic and beautiful. The kayak tour was good and the guide was very friendly. It got better when everyone started to play with the water gun :)

Awesome day kayaking it was 100 degrees out and didn’t feel that hot… the guides are wonderful and full of information, this was my 2nd trip with this company and if I could give them more than 5 stars I would highly recommended
So glad to hear you had lots of fun.  We love to share the beauty of the Black Canyon and Emerald Cave with our guests.

It was our first time in Las Vegas and we decided to do the emerald cave kayaking which was absolutely the right decision, after this amazing experience.  In addition to the spectacular nature our tour guide Charlie made an amazing job and was very informative and knowledgeable of the place. We will definitely come again.

What a great experience! Our tour guides, Xavier and Charlie were amazing and very informative. We had so much fun with our group- we even stopped on the little beach to cool off in the beautiful water. I highly recommend!

Wonderful and easy way to try something new off the strip. Amazing pictures.  Organized.  Saw wild goats and a bald eagle.  Highly recommend.  There is dry storage for jackets, sunscreen, water and phones.  There are opportunities to get off the kayak so water shoes or flip flops are convenient.

The tour guide took us on a hike to the AZ Hot Springs. It was a hike we enjoyed and felt more comfortable having a guide. It was the guide’s birthday and she still took us on our guided hike. Thank you!

The area leading up to the cave had a beautiful greenish hue as well but the cave was breathtakingly beautiful.  The whole trip was awesome and our guide was very friendly and knowledgeable of the area.  I have 3 boys aged 14,12, and 10 and they loved this trip.  My oldest two and my husband kayaked single and my 10 year old and I kayaked in a tandem kayak. I have had many people ask about this trip because of our posts on social media and several friends are planning to go while visiting Vegas.  It’s a great day away from the city and you can add a stop at Hoover Dam as well.
The river is like a hidden gem. We want to spread the word and have visitors that come to Vegas discover this slice of heaven that is so close. Thanks for choosing us to take you on your journey.

It was an amazingly beautiful tour, kayaking right through the mountains and didn’t feel uncomfortable at all, great for beginners and Xander and Jaylin were awesome tour guides, respectful, fun and full of interesting facts and information. Would recommend to anyone who enjoys to be out in nature. Great for couples who need to relax and get away from the chaos of the city or otherwise. Get out and adventure!

Awesome kayak tour! Xander and Jonathan were excellent guides, as well as providing great entertainment. They know their audience well, helping the less experienced and giving them confidence, but playing with the more seasoned kayakers who wanted to have water gun fights and paddle battles. Worth noting that the Emerald Cave is only a very small, short part of this tour (although very beautiful), and that the whole excursion is a great adventure.

Besides the let down of expecting a much deeper and more interesting cave, the staff made sure this trip was as enjoyable as it could be. Tyler was absolutely incredible and is the only reason im  going to recommend this trip to others. When you go, ask for Tyler ! You wont be disappointed.

We had an awesome time on our kayak adventure. Rachel, Ray and Aaron did a fantastic job leading, teaching and informing us. We learned a lot about the area & history, saw some pretty amazing views and learned to kayak. 10/10 would recommend!

Patrick, it's great to hear your group had such a great time out on the river with us. We have perfected the  splash technique to cool off our guests during the summer heat and always help out when guests get a bit tired from the paddling. You all did really well. Thanks for leaving your amazing guides an outstanding review:)-Your guides...Aaron and Alissa

Amazing service!!! Our tour guide Esther was top knotch from the beginning of our tour all the way to our drop of. She and our other guide Jonathan were knowledgeable, helpful, and down right nice. They will see us again!

This was my very 1st time kayaking and it was fantastic. I wasn't sure if I could do this.  If I can do it, anybody can. Ray, Rachel and Jaylin were excellent tour guides. They gave proper safety instructions, from putting on the life vest properly, to being measured for the steering peddles, how to steer the rudder and how to paddle. They all were knowledgeable about the Fish Hatchery, Mohave Lake, wildlife, how the Colorado River, Hoover Dam and Lake Mead all tie in together. They also explained about the history behind of the Dam and the significance of the water supply level and severe drought. The Emerald cave was so interesting and bright green. This tour provided us all with bottled water, Capri Sun drinks and plenty of snacks midway through the tour. This was a 4 mile Kayaking trip. I now hope to try Kayaking again. I definitely recommend this tour.

We had a tour with Anthony.  He did a wonderful job with safety, guidance and was knowledgeable about the history of the area.  He appeared to truly enjoy his job and made us all feel comfortable. I would highly recommend this tour for families, ask for Anthony!

It was a wonderful experience for our family. The guides were awesome (Charlie and Ray). It was absolutely beautiful and peaceful. The guides told us all about the area. The paddle back was a little rough since we went on a very windy day. They provided drinks and snacks. Just a great day of fun.

This was my second time booking with Evolution, and it was just as incredible as the first. Xander gave clear instructions, was knowledgeable about the history of the area, and was very patient with my friend who was kayaking for the first time. I would definitely recommend this company to friends, and will personally book them again in the future.

This was a great family excursion. We enjoyed the beauty of the Colorado River and the scenery surrounding it. The water was so clear and cool! The best part of the trip was our fabulous tour guides, Aaron and Rachael. They were so friendly, professional and full of interesting knowledge about the area. Thank you for making our adventure so special!

We had such an amazing time with AARON AND RACHAEL.   Our family (group of 14) had reservations to Evolution Expedition and we had so much fun.   The kids/teens/and adults enjoyed it more than the Vegas strip.   We have gotten non stop requests to go back again and do a longer guide with Aaron and Rachael.   On the car ride back to Vegas, the kids were laughing and retelling their experience.   They enjoyed the  water guns that were provided in the kayak, the surprise snacks and drinks, along with the hike and history of the river.  The enjoyed how playful our guides were.   We were able to shoot water guns at them and they in turn used their paddle to throw water at us.We cannot thank Rachael and Aaron enough for the precious memories that they have provided my family.   We will recommend them to all our family and friends and will request to book for them in the future and also go for a longer kayak adventure.

Jenna and Zander were great guides. We had a group of 12, first timers to experienced. Jenna was amazing with this first timer. We saw turtles, rattle snake and other wildlife. I recommend this tour for everyone. This is a great way to see wildlife and enjoy the lake.

Wow! We love hearing that our tours were some of the best experiences people remember when visiting Las Vegas. So many people don't even realize this gorgeous stretch of river we paddle is only an easy hour drive from the LV strip. It's a great alternative to take a break from the casinos. We appreciate your post.
Our guides do make for an unforgettable time out on the river! They are fun, knowledgeable and experienced. We are thrilled you had a great time out there with our crew.

My wife and I enjoyed the whole trip.  Excellent value.  The equipment was good, the guides, Rae & Alina were knowledgeable, knew the area well and were happy to help.  I would highly recommend the trip.  Excelletn guides, Rae & Alina.

Jared...Ray and Xander ROCK! Our tours are such a fantastic way to break away from the city and nurture yourself with a lil bit of peace and serenity while kayaking the Black Canyon. Appreciate the great review.

Thank you Heidi for the 5 star review. Anthony is so patient and kind with his guests. He pays such attention to detail when it comes to safety and fun out on the river. We are thrilled your adventure was wonderful.

We did this kayak experience while staying in Las Vegas and I can tell you it was an amazing time, all the girls that prep us all into the adventure were fantastic in all possible ways, they provide us with a great introduction and got everything just perfect, they even had snacks, water and other drinks.Super patient with the new kayaking people like us, entering that cave is tricky but they helped everyone and we had a great experience I can’t wait to do it again, thanks girls for all the awesome fun you guys providedI highly recommend and will pass on your info to my friends and family Thank you!!!!
Jesse and Candice you are awesome guides! This is a beautiful kayak experience like nothing I have ever experienced! Interesting history info! An adventure Worth repeating! TU!

Candace was awesome!! She was knowledgeable and super fun to hangout with! She definitely knew how to make the trip memorable! You can tell she really enjoys her job. At the end, we had a splashing war and I got soaked! It was a nice way to cool off after kayaking in the hot sun. I would go on this trip again!!

10/10 recommend this company!!! We did the express kayak tour to Emerald Cove. From start to finish, we had an amazing time. Claudia made sure to assist us in every way we needed. This company goes above and beyond to ensure safety and the best experience.

The Emerald Cave Express tour with guides Bridget and Jenna was phenomenal! Bridget and Jenna were knowledgeable, entertaining, and provided excellent kayaking instruction. This trip is perfect for beginners who have never kayaked before, but is also just as enjoyable for those with more experience. The only disappointing part of the trip was the size of Emerald Cave. I thought we would be doing a kayaking tour in a cave...that's not exactly the case. Overall, the tour was an amazing experience and I would recommend Evolution Expeditions to anyone interested in a unique and beautiful adventure on the Colorado River.

Our guides have years of experience on the river and are all thoroughly trained in CPR/Wilderness First Aid. They have a plethora of knowledge that they love passing along to their guests. We appreciate you taking the time to post a review, thank you.

Our family (hubby, me and 2 adult children) have  done a Christmas trip in mid-December for the past two years and we love outdoor activities. This was a unique and perfect experience and was really pretty close to Las Vegas. The views were breathtaking and majestic and the kayaking wasn’t really hard at all (mostly upper body work). We took our time and Candace, our guide, made sure we knew how to maneuver the kayaks, provided facts, drew our attention to animals and especially answered geological questions. She made the trip really enjoyable and fascinating.  We never had any worries for our safety at all.  It felt wonderful being out in the open without boats, noise or other distractions. It’s really beautiful!  I highly recommend this tour and with this group in particular. Everything was on time, exactly as presented to me and they made sure all questions were answered!   A must do!
Super professional & adventurous kayaking experience! Lauren and Candice were exceptional guides, you definitely have to enjoy this time!
Absolutely had an amazing trip! Out guide Kylee was amazing and so much fun. Worth the time and money! No doubt the highlight of our entire trip!
This was absolutely amazing! Kylee was our guide and she’s so sweet and is full of information! Be sure to ask for her if you’re able! She took tons of pictures and was sure to send them to us.

AMAZING Kayaking Tour.  Top of the line equipment and staff.  So impressed with the professionalism of this staff and company.  I would HIGHLY recommend this to amateur as well as experienced kayakers.  Our guide shared history on the tour as well.  LOVED this tour!!!  Thank you!!Terre

There is literally nothing we love more than spending our days in the Black Canyon. Michelle is a seasoned guide who knows how to perfectly execute top notch tours. Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. It means a lot to our guides because it reaffirms their exceptional skills. Next time you need some adventure don't be afraid to contact us!

We really appreciate reviews that include pro tips so thank you!! The best thing about the Black Canyon National Water Trail is that it has a season for everyone!!  Did you wanna spend your day swimming in crystal clear emerald green water? Then summer is for you! What about spending your whole morning exploring and relaxing in hot springs? Fall, winter, and spring have perfect soaking temperatures. We can't rave enough about how we have a tour for every person and every season. So next time you're looking for an adventure, please contact us and try another one of our tours! Thanks!

I'd love to emphasize how the Black Canyon National Water trail and Lake Mohave in the Lake Mead NRA is WORTH THE DRIVE! People are slowly starting to realize that just outside of Las Vegas there is a stunning and world class paddling destination. Most people show up to Las Vegas without any idea that there is accessible water ways a hour away! Reviews like this one help spread the word, so thank you for taking the time to review your day. The canyon is gorgeous, but its the guides that really make the tour!

Favorite part of the kayak trip was the autumn-color of the Colorado river....it has a turquoise/aquamarine hue....cold and clear.    And getting a good paddle-workout on the (faster) return-pace.    I recommend the trip for ANY LEVEL of kayaker....going at YOUR OWN pace.I especially want to commend one of the guides named: JEN.....she (and her partner) were very communicative, friendly, and professional through the whole tour.
Rachel and Jenna were amazing! Highly recommend! Knowledgeable, fun, and felt like we were kayaking with friends. Thank you both so much!

We have more adventures to offer so don't be shy and come spend your day with Jenna and Rachael again soon! We appreciate the time you took to review our guides as they work very hard to share this beautiful water way.

My friends and I had a great experience kayaking yesterday with Evolution Expeditions.  Our guides Michelle and Jenna were very personable and helpful and ensured we all had a great time.  As a first time kayaker I was concerned about tipping over and that my lack of skill might hinder the group, but Michelle and Jenna were very patient helping us novices and ensuring we were comfortable.  The scenery was beautiful and it was a great experience.  I would highly recommend!
It was awesome, great experience, Will recommend to everyone to do this ones. The tour guide was very pleasant  and Dynamic. Kayaking are in excellent condition. Really it was worth the money.

The staffs were super friendly and helpful. Laura was our guide. She helped us set up the kayaks and showed us how to use it. She showed us different spots along the river and told us stories and history of it. We visited the Emerald Cave. The cave was not big and deep but still interesting to see it. We went swimming, a small hike, and had snacks. We talked, joked, chased each other, and splash water onto each other. We had lots of fun with Laura and the group!

The two tour guides were so helpful and patient. They never made me feel silly for forgetting how to do something or having to show me again. They made it fun and conversation made the trip so much better. It was like talking to friends. Rachel and Jenna were a great duo, I'd compare them to batman and Robin. Hahaha. Would recommend this a 100 times over.

The fun atmosphere that Rachel & Jenna provided was fantastic! They were helpful, laid back, and made the outing very enjoyable. We will be returning to do the longer trip next time, but we felt this outing was perfect for beginners or people looking for a few hours of fun. Thank you Evolution!

We had the BEST time!!! Jenna and Rachel were awesome!! They had snacks and water for everyone, and they were so kind and funny! It was my first time kayaking and both guides were super helpful. I had no trouble at all in the water! We want to go back again and again! Highly recommend!!

Our tour guide Stewart at Evolution Expedition was informative, fun and kind he was knowledgeable about the entire area and provided great information on our mini hike to the historical site. He provided delicious snacks and cold water for us on our walk. I am not an experienced kayaker and he provided us with guidance and tips, made sure our experience was fun and easy. I would definitely recommend Kayaking if you are in the area of Las Vegas, it is only 20 mins away, and it is lots of fun.

The kayaking trip was fun and safe! I enjoyed all of the nature surrounding us! I appreciated our tour guide Shay, she was very helpful and knowledgeable about the surrounding area and the animals which was very appreciated!
The tour was amazing and our tour guide shay made it 100x better ! She was very nice and respectful and helped us out a lot. I’d recommend shay to anyone that goes there for a tour !!

Our tour guide Laura was informative and fun!! She showed us such a beautiful place. Laura was knowledgeable about the entire area and provided information on the plants on our walk to a historical site. On our snack /walk stop we even saw a Bald 🦅 Eagle. I am not an experienced kayaker and she provided us with guidance and tips
This was an amazing trip. Jenna was a fabulous guide and helped us start our anniversary trip off right. Highly recommend this trip and this company. Top of the line equipment and professional staff.
Loved this tour! Would definitely recommend to my friends. The tour guide was great and cool historical information he pointed out on the tour.
Beautiful scenery, excellent guide who gave us the history of the area.  Highly recommend!  Fun for the whole family.  Good workout, but not super taxing.

Great guides bridget and Anthony made it a fun day ! Nice to talk to, and took good care of the group. Good instruction, safe but also a good time with some splashes! Good pace. Beginners were comfortable.  Gorgeous views and crystal clear water. Even saw some bighorn sheep!!! :) Covid careful as we ate and stayed in our own group.
It takes two to tango! Thank you guys for a fun day on the river and great conversation! Hope to see you on the river again someday. =)-Stewart
Y'all were awesome! Nothing makes me happier than paddling with folks who love nature and sharing knowledge. I hope to see y'all for a future tour. =)-Stewart

What an Amazing experience. Stewart and Michelle were phenomenal guides that gave us a little history as we paddled away. We took a break and they provided us with water, snacks and sunscreen. Emerald cave was beautiful, definitely worth the trip.  Highly recommend!

SAW AN AMERICAN BALD EAGLE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN MY LIFE!! First off, our tour guide Bridgette was amazing!! She helped our friend who fell out of his kayak and also showed us such a beautiful place. She was so knowledgeable about the entire area and it’s history down to the geology and the plants and she made the adventure so much fun!! Coolest thing by far was we got to see an American Bald Eagle during our tour, that’s once in a lifetime opportunity!! The trip is easy and tolerable for kayakers with no experiences and the unique views of the canyons and Colorado River are worth the trip! Thank you again to Bridgette for being the best tour guide in the world!!
Was well worth every penny. They took very good care of us. Had so much fun would do it again, our guide was Shay she was amazing and so much fun.
Anthony and Rachael were incredible! Super helpful and sweet . The tour was super fun! My 5 year old daughter loved it !

My boyfriend and I took a trip to Las Vegas for a little getaway trip. We knew we wanted to explore some nature and this immediately caught my eye. Upon arrival we were warmly greeted by 2 tour guides. They were very sweet and easy to talk to. Our tour guide was Stewart and he was extremely knowledgeable about kayaking, the land, nature, and history of the area. I would highly recommend to anyone who is down for nature and good company!

Arrived at the gate only to discover that there was an entry fee of $25 to the park. It was not included in the cost of this excursion. The ranger was nice enough to let us through though. Also, it was unclear of what time to arrive as the location is in AZ (Mountain time) and Vegas is on Pacific. So if you are coming from Vegas, make sure you know what time it is in AZ or you will end up arriving an hour early like we did. The tour guide was very helpful, welcoming, knowledgeable and funny too. Gave great instructions on how to operate the kayak. The kayaks come with compartments for your personal items to keep them from getting wet. They are also adjustable to accommodate tall people like me. We kayaked a total of 4 miles so be prepared for the exercise. Stopped for a short hike and had water and snacks provided for us. The river water is 58° all year round which was very refreshing in the summer heat. Was with a group of about 10 so it was just the right size group. The marina provides other type of watercraft if you are not wanting to kayak. Due to COVID-19, the restaurant was not open at the marina but there was a small convenience store for snacks and drinks. Overall, a great excursion and I would very much recommend this tour.

Omg, This was amazing!! First time kayaker and it was easy. Shay was a great tour guide.  The whole journey was cool especially the swimming. Side note. Food!! The food was great. You can clearly tell whoever made it didn't just throw meat together lol. Overall it was a great experience.  I happened to record the whole thing , which will be up on my youtube channel.  @kickingitwithdarrel. Two things to Nit-pick , the cave wasn't as big as I thought it would be, which wasn't a big deal honestly. And two, my 80 dollar pass expired 3 months into the covid19 lock down. Which isn't fair in my opinion that I had to pay 25 dollars at the gate again when I had 3 months on it before the shutdown.  Like I basically paid 80 dollars for a 9 month pass. Advice ill give to make it more exciting.  Cliff jumping. There were so many kids and adults jumping off a very small cliff.  I mean we already signed the waivers why not add it lol.But over it was a great experience and I'll highly recommend it.

Just got off the water and had the best time. Bridgette, one of our 3 lovely guides, was very informative, Rachel was great with keeping all of us newbs in line, and finally Michelle the leader of return pack. Keep it up Ladies🚣‍♀️🛶🚣‍♂️

I had a very pleasant and enjoyable kayak trip with our group and that’s all thanks to Michelle, our guide. She was professional, knowledgeable and fun. A couple group members were late but she kept calm and also kept us on track. The whole trip was easy and relaxing while learning some interesting facts about the river and the Hoover dam. Thanks Michelle!

Yes Emerald Cave is smaller than some photos make it look at times, though it is a gem of a place! Black Canyon alone is spectacular that we can agree! Happy to hear you enjoyed yourself out on the water with us! Thank you so much for sharing your experience and hope to catch you for your next adventure in the canyon!

Paul...so glad you were able to make this trip a reality. It took a lot of planning on your part to get all your navy buddies together. Great we were a part of making memories with old friends. You all were a blast to have out on the river and did such a fantastic job paddling. We wish you all well and hope you can make this a yearly reunion. The Black Canyon has so much to offer!
